announce_elixir_player_speed.en: We can help carry heavy stuff!
announce_elixir_player_speed.trans: 我们可以帮忙搬重的东西！

2.trans: 或许它现在会更高兴一点。

3.en: I hope you like our tribute!
3.trans: 我希望你喜欢我们的贡品！

describe_plantstressorhappiness.en: Aww, do you need someone to talk to?

announce_lunar_rift_max.en: We can see something glowing waaay over there!
announce_lunar_rift_max.trans: 我们看到那边有东西在发亮！

announce_cold.en: Brrr... spider hair isn't very warm.
announce_cold.trans: 嘶~~~蜘蛛的毛发不是很保暖。

announce_yotb_learn_new_pattern.en: We can't wait for our beefalo to try it on!
announce_yotb_learn_new_pattern.trans: 好期待我们的皮弗娄牛穿上！

announce_firenettle_toxin_done.en: Whew, we'll be more careful not to touch strange weeds.
announce_firenettle_toxin_done.trans: 呼，我们会更加小心，不会再碰奇怪的杂草了。

1.en: We're learning so much about this plant!
1.trans: 我们对这种植物有了更多的了解!

announce_cavein.en: I think the sky is falling!

announce_eyeofterror_arrive.en: Why do we feel like we're being watched?
announce_eyeofterror_arrive.trans: 为什么感觉有人在监视我们？

announce_cantbuildhere_yotb_post.en: We should put this where the judge can see it.
announce_cantbuildhere_yotb_post.trans: 我们应该把这个放在裁判能看到的地方。

announce_plant_randomseed.en: We can't wait to see what it is!
announce_plant_randomseed.trans: 我们迫不及待地想知道是什么!

announce_research.en: It's almost like being back in school.
announce_research.trans: 感觉好像回到了学校里。

3.trans: 您的愿望就是我们的命令！

announce_lightsout_shadowhand.en: Hey, no fair! Nobody invited that hand to play!
announce_lightsout_shadowhand.trans: 嘿，不公平！没人请过那只手来玩！

announce_shadowthrall_stealth.en: Ouch! No fair! We can't see you!
announce_shadowthrall_stealth.trans: 哎哟!不公平！我们看不到你！

out_of_water.en: Aw, we're all out of water.

inuse.en: Aww, we have to wait our turn.
inuse.trans: 嗷，我们得等轮到我们再上。

burning.trans: 啊！蜘蛛朋友们，你们的家！！

frozen.en: Hmm it might be hard to get our decorations to stick to ice...
frozen.trans: 嗯，我们的装饰品很难粘在冰上……

already_bedazzled.en: We think we already decorated it pretty good.
already_bedazzled.trans: 我们觉得已经装饰得很好啦。

burnt.en: There isn't really much left to decorate...

mismatch.en: We don't think these are the right plans.

inuse.en: Aw, we don't wanna mess up someone else's stuff.
inuse.trans: 噢，我们不想弄乱别人的东西。

empty.en: We need stuff to build with.
empty.trans: 我们需要一些建造材料。

hermitcrab_relocate.en: Oh no, it's dry! We'll try again later.
hermitcrab_relocate.trans: 糟糕，是干的！我们晚点再试。

nothing_inside.trans: 我们在里面什么也没找到！

inmood.en: I think they're a bit too cranky for that right now.
inmood.trans: 我觉得他们现在有点不太高兴。

beef_hitched.trans: 我们的皮弗娄牛哪都不会去。

needbeef.en: We don't have a beefalo to hitch up.

needbeef_closer.en: Our beefalo is too far away!
needbeef_closer.trans: 我们的皮弗娄牛太远了！

dead.en: Um. We should probably keep it.

sleeping.en: Aww... They're getting their snoozies right now!
sleeping.trans: 啊呜呜...它们现在正在打盹！

unsuitable_for_plants.en: Ms. Wickerbottom says that salt water is bad for plants.
unsuitable_for_plants.trans: 薇克巴顿女士说咸水对植物有害。

oversizedveggies_too_small.en: We'll have to get a bigger veggie, or maybe a fruit!
oversizedveggies_too_small.trans: 我们得去找个大点的蔬菜或者水果来!

fish_too_small.trans: 这位小朋友个头太小了！！

notamerm.trans: 大人应该不许我们这么做。

inuse.en: It's okay, we can wait for you to finish!
inuse.trans: 没关系，我们可以等你做完！

notmasterchef.en: Warly gets upset when we play with his things.
notmasterchef.trans: 我们不能乱玩他的东西，沃利会生气。

notsouljarhandler.en: We promised not to play with the souls.
notsouljarhandler.trans: 我们答应过不乱玩灵魂。

generic.trans: 没办法，超出了我们的能力范围。

inuse.en: We'll get our crayons ready while they finish up!
inuse.trans: 他们完成后，我们会准备好我们的蜡笔！

generic.en: We can't write on that now.

no_racers.en: We need to find some Carrats!
no_racers.trans: 我们要找一些胡萝卜鼠！

notdish.en: We don't think we should offer that.
notdish.trans: 我觉得我们不应该提供那个。

nogeneratorskill.en: We'd rather keep this one for ourselves.
nogeneratorskill.trans: 我们宁愿把这个留给我们自己。

nomoon.en: Doesn't work. We probably need to see the moon or something.
nomoon.trans: 不行。我们大概需要看到月亮之类的。

slotfull.en: Mom said to always finish my plate before seconds.
slotfull.trans: 妈妈告诉我要吃完碗里的再夹新菜。

dead.en: Um. We should probably keep it.

foodfull.en: It's still working on the first one.

wrongshadowform.en: We put the bones together wrong.
wrongshadowform.trans: 我们组合骨头的方式是错的。

notamonkey.en: Sorry, neither of us speak monkey.
notamonkey.trans: 对不起，我俩都不会说猴话。

mushroomfarm_needslog.en: It needs a special kind of log!
mushroomfarm_needslog.trans: 它需要一种特殊的木头！

ghostheart.en: We don't think we even want them to come back.
ghostheart.trans: 我们根本不想让他们回来。

busy.en: We can try again when it's finished.
busy.trans: 我们可以在它完事后再试试。

pigkinggame_danger.en: Lets wait until the danger passes before we play.

wronggem.en: We'd rather keep this one for ourselves.
wronggem.trans: 我们宁愿把这个留给我们自己。

terrarium_refuse.en: Maybe we can give it something else?
terrarium_refuse.trans: 也许我们可以给它一些别的东西？

terrarium_cooldown.en: Let's wait for the little tree to come back first!

pigkinggame_toolate.en: It's too close to bedtime to start another game.
pigkinggame_toolate.trans: 快到睡觉时间了，来不及开始另一场比赛了。

mushroomfarm_nomoonallowed.en: We don't think they're going to grow.

queenbusy.en: She looks pretty busy... maybe we'll just wait.
queenbusy.trans: 她看起来很忙……干脆我们就等着吧。

pigkinggame_messy.en: We need to clean up before we can play.
pigkinggame_messy.trans: 我们需要先清理一下才能玩。

spidernohat.en: There's not enough room, we don't want to squish them by accident!
spidernohat.trans: 没有足够的空间，我们不想一不小心就把它们压扁了！

abigailheart.en: Wendy would've been so happy if it worked.
abigailheart.trans: 可惜没效，不然温蒂会很开心。

notsculptable.en: Eight legs isn't nearly enough to sculpt with THAT.
notsculptable.trans: 就算长八条腿也雕刻不了那东西。

notstaff.en: We think that'd make it angry.

bedazzled.en: But we made it look so nice! Let's keep it the way it is.
bedazzled.trans: 我们好不容易让它变得这么好看！就让它保持原样吧。

inuse.en: We have to wait our turn.
inuse.trans: 得等轮到我们的时候才能用。

inuse.en: We didn't climb into the saddle in time!
inuse.trans: 我们没能及时爬进鞍座！

sleeping.trans: 哎呀，你刚刚是在睡觉吗？

alreadyknown.en: Hey, we already have that one!

nohealth.en: We don't feel so good right now. Maybe later?
nohealth.trans: 我们现在感觉不是很好。可能晚些时候？

nooccupant.en: Once we've got a beefalo hitched up, we can make them fancy!
nooccupant.trans: 只要再栓上一头皮弗娄牛，我们就能把它打扮得美美的！

inuse.en: We'll give them some privacy while they change.
inuse.trans: 他们变身时，我们要给他们点私人空间。

notenoughhair.en: Maybe once the fur grows back.
notenoughhair.trans: 也许等毛发长回来就可以了。

nocarnival.en: Aww, did all the birds leave?
nocarnival.trans: 啊，所有的鸟都离开了吗？

mannequin_equipswapfailed.en: Actually, maybe we'll just keep it instead.
mannequin_equipswapfailed.trans: 我们干脆自己留着好了。

pillowfight_no_handpillow.trans: 我们得有个枕头才能玩啊！

kitcoon_hideandseek_not_enough_hiding_sp.en: It's okay, but maybe we can find a place with more hiding spots.
kitcoon_hideandseek_not_enough_hiding_sp.trans: 这里也还行，不过我们也许能找到更适合玩捉迷藏的地方。

kitcoon_hideandseek_not_enough_hiders.en: It'll be more fun with more kitcoons.
kitcoon_hideandseek_not_enough_hiders.trans: 多叫几只小浣猫来才好玩。

carnival_host_here.en: We're pretty sure we saw him over here.
carnival_host_here.trans: 我们很确定我们在这里看到了他。

hostbusy.en: He looks pretty busy, we can come back later.
hostbusy.trans: 他看起来很忙，我们可以晚点再来。

kitcoon_hideandseek_one_game_per_day.en: That was fun! Can we play again tomorrow?
kitcoon_hideandseek_one_game_per_day.trans: 真好玩！我们明天能再玩一次吗？

alreadyactive.en: Maybe there's another contest going on somewhere else?
alreadyactive.trans: 也许在别的地方还有别的比赛？

professionalchef.en: Warly gets upset when we play with his things.
professionalchef.trans: 我们不能乱玩他的东西，沃利会生气。

shadowmagic.en: I don't think we should play with that...
shadowmagic.trans: 我认为我们不应该玩那个…..

toodeep.en: We can't reach the fish with this rod!
toodeep.trans: 这鱼竿钓不到这里的鱼！

wrongpiece.en: This two piece puzzle sure is hard!

wronggear.en: We think we should use a different fishing rod.
wronggear.trans: 我们觉得应该换一根鱼竿。

empty.en: But what should we wrap up?
empty.trans: 但是我们应该把什么打包起来？

generic.en: We already know everything about this plant!
generic.trans: 我们已经知道了关于这种植物的一切！

fertilizer.en: There's nothing else we need to know.
fertilizer.trans: 我们不喜欢知道其他的东西了。

dead.en: Um. We should probably keep it.

sleeping.en: Aww... They're getting their snoozies right now!
sleeping.trans: 啊呜呜...它们现在正在打盹！

glassed.en: There's too much glass in the way.

already_bombed.en: Aw, we wanted to do it!

someoneelsesbeefalo.en: We shouldn't do that to someone else's beefalo.
someoneelsesbeefalo.trans: 我们不应该这样对别人的皮弗娄牛。

awakebeefalo.en: It's hairy like us, but I don't think it likes shaving.
awakebeefalo.trans: 它像我们一样多毛，但估计不喜欢剃毛。

webberonly.trans: 好的，所有人都跟上我们！

doer_isnt_module_owner.en: We don't think Jimmy wants to play.

generic.en: I don't want to. Mom always said the kitchen was dangerous!
generic.trans: 我不想做饭，妈妈总是说厨房很危险！

messagebottlemanager_not_found.en: We should wait until we get outside.
messagebottlemanager_not_found.trans: 我们应该等到去外面再说。

wrongworld.en: Is it upside down? Nope. It's just wrong.
wrongworld.trans: 它是不是颠倒了？没有。它只是错了。

known.en: I'm pretty sure one of us knows that one.
known.trans: 我俩其中肯定有人已经知道了。

stash_map_not_found.en: Hey... there's no "X" on this map!
stash_map_not_found.trans: 嘿……这张藏宝图上没有标明“X”号！

cantlearn.en: Ms. Wickerbottom will have to explain this one.
cantlearn.trans: 薇克巴顿女士得好好解释一下了。

1.en: We never did much sailing back home.
1.trans: 我们在家乡时没怎么航过海。

2.en: Ouchie! The rope burned our hands!
2.trans: 哎呀！绳子磨伤了我们的手了！

2.en: They all look kind of similar...

full_of_curses.en: We think we've had enough of these bracelets.

restriction.en: We don't want to use that.

inuse.en: Oops. Someone else is using that.

notmine_spider.en: Oh! We're sorry, you looked like a friend of ours.
notmine_spider.trans: 哦！真抱歉，你看起来跟我们的朋友很像。

noimage.trans: 但是我们应该画什么呢？！

inuse.en: Are you finding everything okay in there?

notsouljarhandler.en: We promised not to play with the souls.
notsouljarhandler.trans: 我们答应过不乱玩灵魂。

notmasterchef.en: Warly gets upset when we play with his things.
notmasterchef.trans: 我们不能乱玩他的东西，沃利会生气。

inuse.en: Oops. Someone else is using that.

haspet.en: I like the pet we've got.
haspet.trans: 我喜欢我们得到的宠物。

busy_station.en: We have to wait our turn.
busy_station.trans: 得等轮到我们的时候才能用。

ticoon.en: We're good with just one guide.
ticoon.trans: 我们有一个向导就够了。

mounted.en: All our arms can't quite reach from up here.
mounted.trans: 我们所有的手臂从这都没法够得着。

bad_timing0.en: We need to paddle at the right time!
bad_timing0.trans: 我们得在正确的时机划桨！

bad_timing2.en: Row row row your boat... maybe a bit better next time.
bad_timing2.trans: 划，划，划小船...下次划好点吧。

beef_bell_has_beef_already.en: We already have a beefalo of our own!
beef_bell_has_beef_already.trans: 我们已经有了自己的皮弗娄牛!

not_mine.en: We aren't allowed to play with that.

beef_bell_invalid_target.en: We're pretty sure it's not meant for that.
beef_bell_invalid_target.trans: 我们很确定它不是用来做这个的。

already_marked.en: We're pretty sure we picked the right one!
already_marked.trans: 我们很确定我们选对了!

not_participant.en: We can't play without entering a beefalo in the contest.
not_participant.trans: 没有皮弗娄牛是不能参赛的。

samedish.en: We already put this on a dish.

mismatch.en: Hmmm... I think we need a different dish for this.
mismatch.trans: 嗯……我想我们需要其他餐具。

announce_nohungersleep.en: Our tummy is rumbling, we can't sleep.
announce_nohungersleep.trans: 肚子饿得咕咕叫，睡不着。

announce_carrat_error_fell_asleep.en: This is no time for a nap!
announce_carrat_error_fell_asleep.trans: 现在不是睡午觉的时候！

announce_snowball_too_big.en: We can't roll it any bigger!

describe_plantstressorkilljoys.en: We should do some weeding... even if we don't like to.
describe_plantstressorkilljoys.trans: 我们要除除草了……虽然我们不喜欢。

announce_worms_boss.en: Yikes! Here comes a BIG worm!

announce_nonightsiesta.en: We can't take a nap, it's nighttime!
announce_nonightsiesta.trans: 我们不能睡午觉，现在是晚上！

announce_fertilizer_researched.en: We never knew there was so much to learn about this stuff!
announce_fertilizer_researched.trans: 我们从来都不知道有这么多的学问!

4.en: I thought fishing would be a bit more exciting.

announce_hunt_successful_fork.trans: 他们不会发觉我们的到来！

announce_cozy_sleep.en: We had such a good sleep!

announce_mega_flare_seen.en: Uh-oh, that bright light's attracting a lot of attention...
announce_mega_flare_seen.trans: 呃噢，那束亮光引来了不少注意……

quagmire_announce_win.en: I'm ready to go home now!

announce_rabbitking_aggressive.en: We hear something coming! And it sounds grouchy!
announce_rabbitking_aggressive.trans: 我们听到有东西来了！而且听起来很不高兴！

announce_weak_rat.en: We don't think it can race anymore...

announce_nosleeponfire.en: Mum always said "Don't sleep in a burning building."
announce_nosleeponfire.trans: 妈妈总是说：“不要在燃烧的建筑里面睡觉。”

describe_plantstressorovercrowding.en: We packed too many plants too close together!
describe_plantstressorovercrowding.trans: 我们把太多植物挤在一起了！

quagmire_announce_notrecipe.en: Oh no! That wasn't a recipe!

announce_lowresearch.en: That might've taught a toddler something.
announce_lowresearch.trans: 这只能教教不懂事的小孩。

yotb_post.en: Is our beefalo ready for the contest?
yotb_post.trans: 我们的皮弗娄牛准备好参加比赛了吗？

deerclopseyeball_sentryward_kit.en: We have many eyes and arms to build this!
deerclopseyeball_sentryward_kit.trans: 我们有很多眼睛和手臂来建造这个！

quagmire_casseroledish.en: We can cooks stuff in it.
quagmire_casseroledish.trans: 我们可以用它来煮东西。

generic.en: Our watering can back home didn't look anything like that.
generic.trans: 我们家乡的浇水壶可不是这样的。

empty.en: We'll have to fill it up somewhere.
empty.trans: 我们必须在某个地方填满它。

cozy_bunnyman.en: Can we join your slumber party?
cozy_bunnyman.trans: 我们可以加入你的睡衣派对吗？

quagmire_lamp_post.en: It's the kind of lamp they have in the city.

leif_idol.en: Aww, it's a little angry tree!

beetletaur.en: All that armor must be heavy.
beetletaur.trans: 这一身盔甲肯定很重吧。

twinofterror2.trans: 啊，他们带了一个朋友来！

wortox_nabbag.en: Is it stealing if the thing is just on the ground?
wortox_nabbag.trans: 如果拿放在地上的东西，还算不算偷？

twinofterror1.trans: 啊，他们带了一个朋友来！

slurtle.trans: 待我们去宰了那只蛞蝓龟。

frognewton.trans: 难得碰到我俩都喜欢的！

moose.en: She doesn't look at all pleased to see us.
moose.trans: 她好像并不乐意看到我们。

dragon_scales.en: They don't weigh much for scales.

reviver.en: I think it loves me.

boat_magnet_kit.en: Now how did Mr. Wilson say those pieces went together...?
boat_magnet_kit.trans: 威尔逊先生说这些零件如何组合在一起来着？

lavaarena_tiaraflowerpetalshat.en: I don't think we should wear that.
lavaarena_tiaraflowerpetalshat.trans: 我觉得我们不应该戴那个。

firestarter.en: Another fire? Well, as long as you're happy...

ghost.en: Uh-oh! Does that hurt, %s?
ghost.trans: 噢哦！疼吗，%s？

murderer.en: You're gonna get burned, %s!
murderer.trans: 你是引火烧身，%s！

reviver.en: She's like a burnt marshmallow. Crispy outside, super mushy inside!
reviver.trans: 她就像是一颗烧焦的棉花糖，外脆内软！

trinket_6.en: Maybe we'll find a use for these.
trinket_6.trans: 也许我们可以给这些东西找个用途。

nitre.en: What are we supposed to do with this?
nitre.trans: 这个东西可以用来做什么？

teleportato_box.en: The power in this box is unimaginable.
teleportato_box.trans: 这盒子里的力量不可思议。

eating_corpse.trans: 我们的肚子也咕咕叫了。

trinket_1.en: We could still play with these, if we're extra creative.
trinket_1.trans: 如果我们超有创意，还是能和这些一起玩。

waxing.trans: 魔法能量越来越强烈了！

asparagus.en: Mom said we should eat our vegetables.
asparagus.trans: 妈妈说我们应该多吃些蔬菜。

open.en: It leads back to the light.

full.en: They don't have enough space for us!
full.trans: 他们没有足够的地方给我们！

halloweenpotion_moon.en: Should we drink it? Nah, probably not.
halloweenpotion_moon.trans: 我们该不该喝？不，还是别。

beargervest.en: We'll be the hairiest spider ever.
beargervest.trans: 我们将是史上最多毛的蜘蛛。

wereitem_moose.en: Can you make a toy without meat in it?
wereitem_moose.trans: 你能做一个没肉的玩具吗？

rabbitkinghorn_chest.en: We can hide things with the rabbits!
rabbitkinghorn_chest.trans: 我们可以和兔子们一起藏东西！

ipecacsyrup.en: Wormwood's nice, but he's not very good at cooking.
ipecacsyrup.trans: 沃姆伍德人很不错，但厨艺不太好。

boatrace_start_throwable_deploykit.en: Should we start here? How about there? Or there?
boatrace_start_throwable_deploykit.trans: 我们应该从这里开始吗？这里？还是那里？

generic.en: Look! It's got a little jump rope!

yotc_carrat_race_checkpoint_item.en: Might get lost without these markers.
yotc_carrat_race_checkpoint_item.trans: 要是没了这些路标，可能会迷路。

quagmire_spotspice_sprig.en: It doesn't taste very good on its own.

leif.trans: 那东西是从哪儿冒出来的？！

pigtorch.en: If only we could get closer.
pigtorch.trans: 要是我们能靠得再近点就好了。

book_research_station.en: Seeing someone pick up a heavy book makes us nervous, somehow...
book_research_station.trans: 只要看到有人拿起一本厚书，我们就会紧张，也不知道为什么这样……

beef_bell.en: The beefalo really like this bell, and whoever rings it!
beef_bell.trans: 皮弗娄牛真的很喜欢这个铃铛，谁敲喜欢谁!

mask_ancient_handmaidhat.en: If we put it on, will we look tough too?
mask_ancient_handmaidhat.trans: 如果我们戴上它，我们也会看起来很厉害吗？

level1.en: Can she hear us in there?

long.en: I think it's listening to us!

level3.en: Helloooo? Do you want to come out now?
level3.trans: 你好啊？你现在想出来了吗？

haunted_pocket.en: Put it down! Put it down!

soon.en: It gives us itches and skritches up our spine!

level2.trans: 来吧，阿比盖尔，温蒂想你了！

kitcoon_desert.en: The minister's kit is a golden kit!
kitcoon_desert.trans: 小猫猫，喵喵叫，脾气好，爱撒娇。

ghost.en: Oh no! We should help ourselves!
ghost.trans: 哦，不！我们应该帮助自己！

firestarter.en: Spiderfriend, why did you light that fire?
firestarter.trans: 蜘蛛朋友，为什么你点着那堆火？

murderer.en: We won't let you hurt our friends!
murderer.trans: 我们不想让你伤害我们的朋友！

attacker.en: Ah! We look scary when we're mad!
attacker.trans: 啊哈！我们生气时会很可怕！

reviver.en: %s likes helping ghosts, just like us.
reviver.trans: %s喜欢帮助鬼魂，这和我们一样。

pitchfork.en: A good tool to play in the dirt.

charcoal.en: Hard and black, like my better half.
charcoal.trans: 又黑又硬，像我另一半一样。

yotd_steeringwheel_item.en: That's for making a steering wheel.
yotd_steeringwheel_item.trans: 多谢做这个方向舵出来！

klaussackkey.en: I think maybe this goes somewhere.
klaussackkey.trans: 我想可能这东西去了哪里。

wintersfeastfuel.en: It fills us with peace and joy!
wintersfeastfuel.trans: 为我们带来了平静和喜乐！

slingshotammo_gold.en: Do you want us to help clean up?

generic.en: We didn't know rocks could smell.
generic.trans: 我不知道岩石还有气味。

ratatouille.en: Do we have to eat our veggies?
ratatouille.trans: 我们必须吃这些素食吗？

has_item.en: I remember drawing at the table.
has_item.trans: 想起了以前在桌子上画画的时候。

generic.en: I remember drawing at the table.
generic.trans: 想起了以前在桌子上画画的时候。

quagmire_rubble_clocktower.en: I don't think that clock works anymore.
quagmire_rubble_clocktower.trans: 我觉得那个钟已经坏了。

sitting.en: Is there a spider friend rustling beneath?
sitting.trans: 下面是有一只蜘蛛朋友在沙沙作响吗？

carnivalcannon_kit.en: We can't wait to play with it!
carnivalcannon_kit.trans: 我们迫不及待地想玩这个游戏！

hermitcrab.en: She reminds me of grandma... but meaner.
hermitcrab.trans: 她让我想起奶奶……但是她更凶。

chesspiece_hornucopia.en: Boy, I wish we could eat it.
chesspiece_hornucopia.trans: 好家伙，我希望我们可以吃了它。

potato_seeds.en: We can find out what they are by planting them.
potato_seeds.trans: 种下它们，我们就会知道它们到底是什么。

hermitcrab_relocation_kit.en: We get to help Ms. Pearl find a new home!
hermitcrab_relocation_kit.trans: 我们可以帮珍珠女士找个新家啦！

battlesong_instant_taunt.en: We probably shouldn't repeat this one. It sounds rude.
battlesong_instant_taunt.trans: 我们还是别说这句的好。听起来像是骂人。

carnivaldecor_lamp.en: Night lights make the dark a little less scary.
carnivaldecor_lamp.trans: 夜灯使黑暗变得不那么可怕了。

halloweencandy_12.trans: 虽然扭来扭去，但让人心满意足。

goldenshovel.en: We're gonna dig so many holes.

palmcone_scale.en: Can we use it for arts and crafts?
palmcone_scale.trans: 我们可以用它来做手工吗？

target_too_far_away.en: Maybe the kit's out of his sniffing range?
target_too_far_away.trans: 也许小浣猫已经脱离了他的嗅觉范围？

tracking_not_mine.en: He's helping someone else right now.

nothing_to_track.en: It doesn't look like there's anything around here...

abandoned.en: We'll try our best to find them on our own.
abandoned.trans: 我们尽量自食其力找到它们。

nearby.en: Is there a kit nearby, our liege?
nearby.trans: 陛下，周围有没有小浣猫？

burnt.en: I guess not everyone likes catcoons...
burnt.trans: 我猜不是每个人都喜欢浣猫……

empty.en: What could we offer it? Something from a bird?
empty.trans: 我们给它什么供品好呢？鸟身上的东西怎么样？

mask_dollrepairedhat.en: We can pretend to be somebody else!

redmooneye.en: That rock needs a nap. Its eye is all red!
redmooneye.trans: 那块岩石需要打个盹。它的眼睛都红了！

wereitem_beaver.en: It looks just like you, Mr. Woodie!
wereitem_beaver.trans: 跟你是一个模子刻出来的，伍迪先生！

boat_rotator.en: We can turn the boat like a merry-go-round!
boat_rotator.trans: 我们可以像旋转木马一样转船了！

wrong_tile.en: What's wrong? Don't you like it there?
wrong_tile.trans: 怎么了？你不喜欢那里吗？

wrong_season.en: It's okay, you can grow when you're ready.
wrong_season.trans: 没关系，等你准备好了再成长。

generic.en: We think it likes its new home.

spear_wathgrithr_lightning.en: It gets our fur all full of static!
spear_wathgrithr_lightning.trans: 它让我们的毛发全是静电！

rope.en: We could tie stuff up with this.
rope.trans: 我们可以用它来捆东西。

wx78module_movespeed2.en: Huh. Is that what robot insides look like?
wx78module_movespeed2.trans: 哈。机器人里面长这样啊？

wx78module_light.en: Huh. Is that what robot insides look like?
wx78module_light.trans: 哈。机器人里面长这样啊？

general.en: It makes us feel safe and cozy.
general.trans: 它使我们感到安全和舒适。

out.en: We still like it, even without the light!
out.trans: 就算没光我们还是喜欢它！

general.en: It makes us feel safe and cozy.
general.trans: 它使我们感到安全和舒适。

out.en: We still like it, even without the light!
out.trans: 就算没光我们还是喜欢它！

mulleddrink.trans: 马上我们的肚子就暖起来了。

fishmeat_dried.en: All the juice has been sucked out of it.
fishmeat_dried.trans: 里面的汁水都被吸干了。

generic.en: There's rocks growing out of that bush!

barren.en: We don't think it can make fruit anymore.
barren.trans: 我们觉得它再也结不了果了。

lowered.en: We hope it catches lots of fish.
lowered.trans: 我们希望它能抓到很多鱼。

generic.en: It's like a web for catching fish!
Maybe I can make it hatch?

antlionhat.en: We can pretend we're an Antlion!
antlionhat.trans: 我们可以假装我们是一只蚁狮！

lavaarena_armorheavy.trans: 我们就像无动于衷的蜘蛛！

blue_cap.trans: 光是想想要吃这个就会疯的...

monkeyisland_portal.en: It doesn't look like it can take us home.
monkeyisland_portal.trans: 看起来它不能带我们回家。

wetgoop.trans: 至少是一次有趣的尝试！

wx78module_maxhunger1.en: Huh. Is that what robot insides look like?
wx78module_maxhunger1.trans: 哈。机器人里面长这样啊？

dryinginrain_notmeat.en: It's hard to dry when it's raining.

dryinginrain.en: It's hard to dry when it's raining.

generic.en: We can dry so many things!
generic.trans: 我们能晾干好多东西呢！

umbrella.en: Should keep some of the rain out.

noeyeball.en: Aww, we have eight eyes and it doesn't even have one.
noeyeball.trans: 嗷，我们有八只眼睛，它连一只都没。

generic.en: Brrr, we don't like it chilly.

mastupgrade_lamp_item_yotd.en: Now our boat can have a light!
mastupgrade_lamp_item_yotd.trans: 我们的小船也要有灯啦！

trap_teeth_maxwell.en: Who would put this here? We could get hurt!
trap_teeth_maxwell.trans: 谁把它放在这里的？我们可能会受伤！

quagmire_pot.en: This pot's a bit bigger than the other one.
quagmire_pot.trans: 这口锅比另一口锅大一点。

ocean_trawler_kit.en: We can build it all by ourselves.

hungry.en: I can see its tummy rumble.
hungry.trans: 我听到它的肚子饿得咕咕叫了。

starving.en: Poor thing. It looks so hungry!
starving.trans: 可怜的小家伙。它看起来好饿！

generic.en: Could this be a friend for us?
generic.trans: 它能成为我们的朋友吗？

mask_blacksmithhat.en: We can pretend to be somebody else!

yotd_anchor.en: Grab onto the sea floor real tight, okay?

wx78module_movespeed.en: Huh. Is that what robot insides look like?
wx78module_movespeed.trans: 哈。机器人里面长这样啊？

salty_dog.en: You're a weird dog, but we like you!
salty_dog.trans: 你是只怪狗狗，但我们喜欢你！

spear_gungnir.en: Wigfrid makes it look so cool!
spear_gungnir.trans: 薇格弗德让它看起来好酷！

wetpaper.en: It'll probably dry off soon. Maybe.
wetpaper.trans: 它可能很快就会变干。或许吧。

burnt.en: Oh no! We worked so hard on that doily!
burnt.trans: 噢不！我们当时很努力才做出那个衬垫！

boat_bumper_yotd_kit.en: Now we can play bumper boats!
boat_bumper_yotd_kit.trans: 现在我们可以玩碰碰船了!

razor.en: I watched my father use one of these.
razor.trans: 我曾经看到过我父亲用这个东西。

slingshot_frame_gems.trans: 沃尔特的玩具是最好玩的。

dumbbell_heat.en: Mr. Wolfgang says it's for warming up.
dumbbell_heat.trans: 沃尔夫冈先生说这是为了热身。

kitcoon_moon.en: The minister's kit is a husky kit!
kitcoon_moon.trans: 小猫猫，喵喵叫，脾气好，爱撒娇。

pudgy.en: We like to cuddle this one!

ornery.en: We're kind of scared of this one.

follower.en: He seems to want to stick around.

dead_mypartner.en: Our poor beefalo! It's not fair!
dead_mypartner.trans: 我们可怜的皮弗娄牛！这不公平！

dead.en: We saw it walking around a minute ago.
dead.trans: 一分钟前我们看到它在走来走去。

naked.trans: 看我帮你剃得干干净净的！

quagmire_oven.en: Mom said I should be careful around the oven.
quagmire_oven.trans: 妈妈说过，在烤箱旁边要小心。

playing.en: We wanna press the big button!

generic.en: It'll let us play if we give it something shiny.
generic.trans: 如果我们给它闪亮的东西，它就会让我们玩。

wetpouch.en: We hope the stuff inside didn't get smushed.
wetpouch.trans: 我希望里面的东西不要被压扁。

powder_monkey.en: Hey, Ms. Wickerbottom says we shouldn't take things that don't belong to us!
powder_monkey.trans: 嘿，薇克巴顿女士教导我们不要拿别人的东西！

dustmoth.en: Maybe it will help us tidy our things if we ask nicely.
dustmoth.trans: 也许我们礼貌的请求，它就会帮我们收拾东西。

blueprint.en: Ooh! We see a prize at the top!
blueprint.trans: 喔！我们瞅见顶上有个奖品！

generic.en: We don't want to get squashed!

pumpkin_cooked.trans: 现在它全身上下都热乎乎的。

costume_fool_body.en: We can wear it in the play!

empty.en: The nine lives thing is true!

wathgrithr_improvedhat.trans: 我们能戴上吗？求求求求了？

oceantree_pillar.en: Now we have our own big tree!
oceantree_pillar.trans: 现在我们有属于自己的大树了！

ghost.en: Oh no! What should we do, %s?
ghost.trans: 噢，不！我们应该怎么做，%s?

firestarter.en: Oh... s-should we start making a fire too?
firestarter.trans: 哦.……我们要不要也生个火？

murderer.en: %s? We thought we were all friends!
murderer.trans: %s？我们一直把你当朋友的！

reviver.en: %s is the best!

moonglass_wobster_den.en: We hear something tip-tapping in there.
moonglass_wobster_den.trans: 我们听见里面有噼里啪啦的声音。

armor_lunarplant.trans: 我们会看起来像个硬汉！

unagi.en: It was easy to make with all our arms.
unagi.trans: 我们有这么多条手臂，这简直是小菜一碟。

yotc_carrat_race_finish_item.en: We can't wait to see who crosses the finish line first!
yotc_carrat_race_finish_item.trans: 我们迫不及待的想看谁会第一个冲线！

slingshot_frame_bone.trans: 沃尔特的玩具是最好玩的。

quagmire_foliage_cooked.en: This probably doesn't count as a salad, huh.

carrot_seeds.en: We could grow something with these.
carrot_seeds.trans: 我们可以用这些种子种点东西出来。

boat_bumper_shell_kit.en: Now we can play bumper boats!
boat_bumper_shell_kit.trans: 现在我们可以玩碰碰船了!

carnivalgame_memory_kit.en: We always wondered what it would be like to run away and join a carnival.
carnivalgame_memory_kit.trans: 我们一直都幻想着跑去参加一场嘉年华。

slingshotammo_rock.en: Do you want us to help clean up?

watermelonhat.en: This is the best idea anyone's ever had.
watermelonhat.trans: 这是所有人从过去到现在想出来的最好的点子。

slingshot_handle_sticky.trans: 沃尔特的玩具是最好玩的。

generic.trans: 它曾经是长势良好的草。

strawhat.en: Keeps the sun out of all eight of your eyes.
strawhat.trans: 让太阳从你八只眼睛中出来。

generic.en: We like watching the kitcoons play with it!
generic.trans: 我们喜欢看小浣猫玩它！

generic.en: We hope the kitcoons like it!
generic.trans: 我们希望小猫咪能喜欢它!

boatrace_checkpoint_throwable_deploykit.en: We get to decide where it goes?

undrawn.en: Can someone lend us a pencil?
undrawn.trans: 有人能借我们一把铅笔吗？

lavaarena_armorextraheavy.en: Maybe we should let someone tougher have it.
lavaarena_armorextraheavy.trans: 也许我们该让更厉害的人拥有它。

cutless.en: Does anyone wanna play pirates with us?
cutless.trans: 有人想和我们一起扮海盗吗？

empty.en: We should give it something. Maybe something fluffy!
empty.trans: 我们应该给它一些东西。试试毛茸茸的东西！

rabbitking_aggressive.trans: 真是一只脾气暴躁的兔子啊！

record_drstyle.en: It makes us want to do a little dance!
record_drstyle.trans: 这让我们想跳一支小舞！

quagmire_bowl_silver.en: Now we have somewhere to put food.
quagmire_bowl_silver.trans: 现在，我们有地方放食物了。

hermitcrab_shell.en: We can see Ms. Pearl anytime we want!
hermitcrab_shell.trans: 我们随时都能去见珍珠女士！

mutator_hider.en: We came up with the recipe all by ourselves!
mutator_hider.trans: 用什么材料都是我们自己想的！

undrawn.en: We don't feel like painting right now.

firestarter.en: Maybe they didn't know fire is dangerous to us.
firestarter.trans: 可能它不知道火对我们有危险。

ghost.en: Bad day destroying humans, %s? Tomorrow will be better!
ghost.trans: 坏日子摧毁了人类，%s？明天会更好！

murderer.en: Let us introduce you to our world wide web! Sh-sha!
murderer.trans: 来试试我们的互联网！嘘—嗄！

attacker.en: We thought you were a friendly robot, %s!
attacker.trans: 我们认为你是个友好的机器人，%s！

reviver.en: Aww. We'd beep-boop %s on the nose if they had one!
reviver.trans: 噢！我们哔卟%s的鼻子，要是他们有一个的话！

generic.en: Hi %s! You look very non-organic today!
generic.trans: 嗨，%s。你今天看起来非常无机！

watermelon_seeds.en: If we eat these will they grow inside us?
watermelon_seeds.trans: 如果吃掉它们，它们会在我们体内生长吗？

moon_altar_cosmic.en: We think it says we're getting closer.
moon_altar_cosmic.trans: 我们认为它在说我们离得不远了。

formal_blueprint.en: Our beefalo might look even more dapper than Maxwell!
formal_blueprint.trans: 我们的皮弗娄牛可能会比麦斯威尔还帅气!

held.en: If we stare at it we'll turn to stone!
held.trans: 盯着它我们会变成石头的！

generic.trans: 我们最喜欢的颜色！红色！

beefalohat.en: The wearer will blend in perfectly.
beefalohat.trans: 穿上它的人会完美地融为一体。

bombed.en: It smells nice and looks pretty.

empty.en: Aw, it's all dried up.

dragonboat_pack.en: It's got everything a boat needs!

hermit_bundle.en: It's always fun to unwrap a package!

fence_gate.en: The hinges are a little squeaky.

marblebean.trans: 曾经在那里，已经采过了!

playbill_the_princess_yoth.en: Does it have a happy ending?

mutator_moon.trans: 我们特别制作了这块曲奇饼！

ice_blueprint.en: Brrr, maybe we should wear gloves for this.
ice_blueprint.trans: 啊呀，也许我们应该戴双手套做这个。

spider_healer.en: We feel better just having them around!
spider_healer.trans: 只要有它们在身边，我们感觉就好多了！

sleeping.en: They're so cute when they sleep.
sleeping.trans: 他们睡着的时候好可爱。

statue.en: It looks like a big puppy.

potato_cooked.trans: 现在它是煮熟的土豆了。

generic.en: We're saving up our tickets for that one in the back!
generic.trans: 我们正在为后面的那个奖品攒奖票！

garlic.en: Maxwell says you ward monsters away with it.
garlic.trans: 麦斯威尔说，它能驱走怪物。

moon_altar_rock_idol.en: Oh no, someone's trapped inside that rock!
moon_altar_rock_idol.trans: 噢不，有人困在石头里面了！

generic.en: It's trying to talk, we think!

security_pulse_cage.en: We wonder what goes in there.
security_pulse_cage.trans: 我们想知道它里面该放什么。

fishsticks.en: One of my favorite foods! Just me though.
fishsticks.trans: 我最喜欢的食物之一！让我穿过去。

marbletree.en: I hope it doesn't fall on us.

quagmire_park_fountain.en: No coins in it. I guess no one made wishes.
quagmire_park_fountain.trans: 里面没有硬币。我猜没人许过愿。

waterplant_planter.trans: 我们应该把你放在哪呢？

sketch.en: We need somewhere to make it!
sketch.trans: 我们需要一个地方来制造它！

carnivaldecor_eggride.en: We wish it was a little bigger so we could ride too!
carnivaldecor_eggride.trans: 我们希望它能再大一点，让我们也骑一下！

carnivalgame_puckdrop_kit.en: We can help the birds set up.
carnivalgame_puckdrop_kit.trans: 我们可以帮鸟儿们组装。

acorn.en: Tree or food, there's something inside.
acorn.trans: 是树或是食物，总之它里面有生命。

shadow_beef_bell.trans: 我们可以拯救我们的皮弗娄牛！

smallmeat.en: A couple more'll make a morsel meal!
smallmeat.trans: 再来两个就算得上一小顿了！

drying_notmeat.en: Is it done yet? I'm hungry.

dryinginrain_notmeat.en: It's hard to dry when it's raining.

dryinginrain.en: It's hard to dry when it's raining.

generic.en: Maybe we could share some meat?
generic.trans: 也许我们该分点肉吃吃？

gunpowder.en: This black powder stuff packs a punch.

spiderhole.en: We could stand to live there.
spiderhole.trans: 我们可以在那里生存下来。

nonslipgrit.en: It makes our spider fingers extra grippy!
nonslipgrit.trans: 让我们的蜘蛛小手更能抓！

slingshot_handle_silk.trans: 沃尔特的玩具是最好玩的。

spiderhole_rock.en: We could stand to live there.
spiderhole_rock.trans: 我们可以在那里生存下来。

armorsnurtleshell.en: It didn't protect the last guy.

kitcoon_yot.en: The minister's kit is an icy kit!
kitcoon_yot.trans: 小猫猫，喵喵叫，脾气好，爱撒娇。

sculpture_bishophead.en: I think it's looking at us!

boat_rotator_kit.trans: 我们最擅长旋转东西了！

warg.en: I don't think that puppy is very happy.
warg.trans: 这只狗狗看起来不太高兴。

quagmire_coin2.en: I wonder what we can buy with this.
quagmire_coin2.trans: 不知道我们能用它买点什么。

monkeyqueen.trans: 她看起来好像很重要的样子。

quagmire_coin1.en: We could trade it for something small.
quagmire_coin1.trans: 我们可以用它换些小东西。

quagmire_coin4.en: The nice lady said we need three of them.
quagmire_coin4.trans: 那个和气的女士说，我们需要三个这样的硬币。

carnivaldecor_figure_kit.en: We can't wait to see what's inside!
carnivaldecor_figure_kit.trans: 我们等不及想看里面有什么！

quagmire_coin3.en: We can buy a whole bunch of stuff with this.
quagmire_coin3.trans: 我们能用它买好多东西。

wagpunk_floor_kit.en: We'll have more room to play.
wagpunk_floor_kit.trans: 我们会有更多玩耍的空间啦。

brokenhorn_follower.en: We feel a bit bad about your horn...
brokenhorn_follower.trans: 你的角变成这样，我们为你难过……

follower.en: We're glad you're our friend now!
follower.trans: 很高兴我们现在是朋友了！

generic.en: Woah, it's got a spear on its head!
generic.trans: 哇，它的头上长了一根长矛！

unwritten.trans: 哦哦喔！我们该说些什么呢？

generic.en: We could write on that if only we had a pen!
generic.trans: 要是有支笔，我们就可以在上面写点什么了！

yotc_carrat_gym_reaction_item.en: All the things we need to build a gym for our Carrat.
yotc_carrat_gym_reaction_item.trans: 胡萝卜鼠健身房的建造材料。

steeringwheel.en: Oh, oh, we want to steer!

turf_road.en: Some ground that we dug up.

yotc_carrat_scale_item.en: We can't wait to see how good our Carrat is.
yotc_carrat_scale_item.trans: 我们迫不及待的想看看我们的胡萝卜鼠有多棒。

acorn_sapling.en: May you have a long and free life.
acorn_sapling.trans: 愿你长久、自由地生活下去。

record_main.en: It makes us want to do a little dance!
record_main.trans: 这让我们想跳一支小舞！

barnacle.en: We found them in the sea!

staffcoldlight.en: Woah! The cold makes all our hairs stand up!
staffcoldlight.trans: 哇！这寒冷让我们所有的头发都竖立起来了！

lureplant.trans: 真是一株颜色美丽的植物。

megaflare.en: Ms. Wickerbottom says we shouldn't pick fights...
megaflare.trans: 薇克巴顿女士说我们不应该惹事生非……

drumstick.en: I just want to bang on my drum.

oceanfishingbobber_crow.en: We turned a feather into a float!
oceanfishingbobber_crow.trans: 我们把羽毛变成了浮漂！

pocketwatch_portal_exit.en: That looks like a long fall.
pocketwatch_portal_exit.trans: 这就是所谓的一落千丈吗？

mask_mirrorhat.en: We can pretend to be somebody else!

merm_tool.en: Wow, it does everything! Sort of.
merm_tool.trans: 哇，它什么都能做！大概是。

turf_mosaic_blue.en: Some ground that we dug up.

footballhat.en: We could be good at football, much better than I was!
footballhat.trans: 我们也可以提高球技，至少比我以前好！

has_item_light.en: We guess it's a bit on the small side...

generic.en: We used to see these at the fair!
generic.trans: 我们以前在集市上经常看到这些东西!

teleportato_crank.en: A crank that will stand up to punishment.
teleportato_crank.trans: 经得起任何粗野对待的曲柄零件。

tillweedsalve.en: It helps get rid of booboos.
tillweedsalve.trans: 它能治好身上破的地方。

hermitcrabtea_petals.en: For when we feel a little funny.
hermitcrabtea_petals.trans: 等我们感觉不对劲的时候喝。

watertree_pillar.en: Can we make a big swing to hang from it?
watertree_pillar.trans: 可以拿它来做一个大秋千吗？

generic.en: There's some kelp floating in the water!

shovel.en: Maybe we can tunnel our way out?
shovel.trans: 也许我们可以挖一条路出去？

pomegranate_oversized.en: We can't even wrap all our arms around it!

woodcarvedhat.en: A cozy hollow for our head.
woodcarvedhat.trans: 给我们脑袋用的舒适空洞。

sentryward.en: Woah! I bet it sees so far!
sentryward.trans: 哇！我打赌它可以看很远！

hot.en: It'll boil if it doesn't cool down soon.
hot.trans: 如果不快点冷却下来的话，它就会被烤熟了。

skeleton_notplayer.en: It makes us a little sad.

boat_bumper_shell.en: It keeps the boat from getting hurt.

quagmire_salt.en: We don't use a lot of salt on our food.
quagmire_salt.trans: 我们做菜时放的盐不多。

chesspiece_moon.en: Almost as pretty as the real thing.
chesspiece_moon.trans: 看起来像真的月亮一样美。

quagmire_onion_cooked.en: Our eyes don't water any more.

slingshotammo_moonglass.en: Do you want us to help clean up?

tillweed.en: It likes to make a mess of our garden.
tillweed.trans: 它喜欢把我们的园子弄得一团糟。

walking_stick.en: It's sticky, but not like a web.

furtuft.en: Fluffy, and not from a spider.
furtuft.trans: 毛茸茸的，而且并非来自蜘蛛。

perd.en: Come back! I just want to eat you!

construction1.en: There's so much building to do, can't we go play instead?
construction1.trans: 有好多东西要建啊，我们就不能去玩啊？

generic.en: It looks pretty impressive... whatever it is!
generic.trans: 它看起来很厉害的样子……虽然不知道它是什么！

idle.en: Aw, I guess we found them all.

generic.en: It's taking us on a treasure hunt!

batnosehat.en: Mother said we must always drink our milk.
batnosehat.trans: 妈妈说，我们一定要常喝牛奶。

saddle_race.en: It's a saddle made out of spidersnacks!
saddle_race.trans: 是用蜘蛛零食做的鞍座！！

trident.en: We don't know how to play, but we can try!
trident.trans: 我们也不知道这个怎么玩，但我们可以试试！

walkingplank_ancient.en: It's the least fun diving board.

book_gardening.en: Why should we read about flowers when we can pick them?
book_gardening.trans: 能摘花的时候为什么要阅读花朵？

burning.en: We really hope it wasn't just sleeping.
burning.trans: 我们真希望它刚才不是在睡觉。

generic.en: Are we sure it's not just sleeping?

quagmire_altar_statue2.en: A lotta goat statues around here.

quagmire_altar_statue1.en: It looks like the friendly goat we met.
quagmire_altar_statue1.trans: 它看起来很像我们遇到的那头友善的山羊。

merm_toolshed.en: Aww, how come we're not allowed inside?
merm_toolshed.trans: 嗷，为什么不让我们进去？

spice_garlic.en: Our breath will smell stinky. Yay!

shadow_forge_kit.trans: 我们应该把它放在哪呢？

generic.en: Hm? Do you need something from me?
generic.trans: 嗯？你需要我给你点什么吗？

moon_altar_wip.en: Don't worry, you'll be together again soon.
moon_altar_wip.trans: 别担心，你很快就又完整了。

veryhappy.en: It's always nice to have more bug friends.
veryhappy.trans: 拥有更多的虫子朋友总是件好事。

monkeypillar.en: How far up does it go?

cactus_meat_cooked.trans: 这下尝到苦头了吧，小刺球！

yotb_pattern_fragment_1.en: It tells us how to make a beefalo costume. Well, part of one...
yotb_pattern_fragment_1.trans: 它能教我们怎么做皮弗娄牛礼服。应该说是，礼服的一部分……

yotb_pattern_fragment_2.en: It tells us how to make a beefalo costume. Well, part of one...
yotb_pattern_fragment_2.trans: 它能教我们怎么做皮弗娄牛礼服。应该说是，礼服的一部分……

yotb_pattern_fragment_3.en: It tells us how to make a beefalo costume. Well, part of one...
yotb_pattern_fragment_3.trans: 它能教我们怎么做皮弗娄牛礼服。应该说是，礼服的一部分……

wx78_moduleremover.trans: 我们也不知道那个安全不安全……

weed_ivy.en: This one's got lots of thorns.

goldenpickaxe.en: The finest pickaxe of them all.
goldenpickaxe.trans: 所有鹤嘴锄之中最好的。

inactive.trans: 我很好奇那是干什么用的。

quagmire_seedpacket.en: We can plant a whole bunch of food with this.
quagmire_seedpacket.trans: 我们能用它种好多东西。

trap.en: Now we can catch some food!
trap.trans: 现在，我们可以抓些食物了！

quagmire_berrybush.en: Aww... all the berries are gone now.
quagmire_berrybush.trans: 啊啊啊，现在浆果全没了。

ghostlyelixir_shield.en: Hey, you didn't tell us you were making crafts!
ghostlyelixir_shield.trans: 嘿，你没告诉我你还会做东西呢！

mosquitobomb.en: It looks gross and yummy at the same time.

generic.en: How did it get so big?
generic.trans: 它是怎么长到这么大的？

twigs.en: Does anyone want to play stick swords with us??
twigs.trans: 有人想和我们玩杖剑吗？

nightlight.trans: 它让我们浑身起鸡皮疙瘩。

corn_seeds.en: We could grow something with these.
corn_seeds.trans: 我们可以用这些种子种点东西出来。

yotb.en: We should show it to the judge!
yotb.trans: 我们应该把它给评委看！

slingshotammo_gelblob.en: Do you want us to help clean up?

featherhat.en: It looks like it took a whole flock to make that hat!
featherhat.trans: 看起来它用了一整棵棉花做的那顶帽子！

pocketwatch_dismantler.en: Can we play with your tools, Ms. Wanda? We'll be careful!
pocketwatch_dismantler.trans: 我们能玩一下你的工具吗，旺达女士？我们会小心的！

balloonvest.en: We should take it on our boat trips.
balloonvest.trans: 我们去划船的时候应该带着它。

line_1.en: It's a picture of some bug people.

line_5.en: A picture of a city. It looks like a nice place to live.
line_5.trans: 城市的图片。看起来像是个宜居的地方。

line_3.en: There's a lot of black goop in this picture.
line_3.trans: 图片里有很多黑色的影像。

line_4.en: A picture of bug people escaping their bug outsides!

cooldown.en: It wasn't a way home, anyway.

destabilizing.en: It looks like it's gonna blow up!

off.en: We need another piece to turn it on.
off.trans: 我们还需要另一片才能打开它。

on.en: Does this mean we get to go home?
on.trans: 这是不是意味着我们可以回家了？

asparagus_cooked.en: Asparagus makes our pee smell funny.
asparagus_cooked.trans: 芦笋让我们的小便气味变得有趣。

burning.en: So much for our arts and crafts!
burning.trans: 它不能再用来制作和合成东西了！

spider_repellent.en: Ms. Wickerbottom said our friends need to go home if they don't behave.
spider_repellent.trans: 薇克巴顿女士说我们的小伙伴要是不听话就得回家。

held.trans: 我们就叫它“弗朗西斯”吧。

pigtent.en: Little pig, little pig, let me in!

chesspiece_bearger_mutated.en: Those teeth look just as sharp as we remember.
chesspiece_bearger_mutated.trans: 这些牙齿看起来和我们记忆中一样锋利。

carnival_vest_c.en: Did they forget to add the bottom half?

carnival_vest_b.trans: 我们一直想要一件斗篷！

waxpaper.en: Why have paper you can't draw on?
waxpaper.trans: 为什么会有你不能在上面画画的纸张呢？

emberlight.en: We like it warm and toasty!
emberlight.trans: 我们喜欢它既温暖又舒适！

mined_out.en: Someone already took all the salt.
mined_out.trans: 有人已经拿走了所有的盐。

book_bees.en: We thought we heard it buzzing!
book_bees.trans: 我们好像听到了它嗡嗡响！

burning.en: What a senseless waste of firewood.

chopped.en: Would a cool bandage make it better, Mr. Tree?
chopped.trans: 急救绷带会有用吗，树先生？

burnt.en: Only we can prevent forest fires.
burnt.trans: 只有我们能防止森林火灾。

revealed.en: What does he have for us?

quagmire_turnip_seeds.en: We can find out what they are by planting them.
quagmire_turnip_seeds.trans: 种下它们，我们就会知道它们到底是什么。

gazpacho.en: I don't wanna eat it, but Warly was nice to make it for us.
gazpacho.trans: 我本来不想吃的，但是沃利人那么好都给我们做好了。

archive_lockbox.en: How will we get it open?

carnival_vest_a.en: We can look just like a crow now! Caw Caw!
carnival_vest_a.trans: 我们现在扮乌鸦了！啊啊！

firestarter.en: No, we're not supposed to play with fire!

ghost.en: Don't worry, we'll make you all better!
ghost.trans: 别担心，我们会让你们都好起来的！

murderer.en: We don't think we should play with that monkey anymore.
murderer.trans: 我们以后别跟那只猴子玩了。

reviver.en: We knew you were a nice monkey!
reviver.trans: 我们就知道你是只好猴子！

wx78module_maxhealth.en: Huh. Is that what robot insides look like?
wx78module_maxhealth.trans: 哈。机器人里面长这样啊？

mask_queenhat.en: We can pretend to be somebody else!

ancientfruit_nightvision_cooked.en: It doesn't help our eyes, but it also doesn't hurt our tummy as much.
ancientfruit_nightvision_cooked.trans: 它对我们的眼睛没有帮助，但吃了肚子也没那么疼。

yotb_post_item.trans: 我们去那边把它建起来！

inspectself.en: Ah! I'm a monster! Haha, we're just kidding.
inspectself.trans: 啊哈！我是个怪物！哈哈，开开玩笑而已。

book_brimstone.en: We don't like how that one ends!
book_brimstone.trans: 我们不喜欢那个的结局！

slurtle_shellpieces.en: Maybe that was a little too rough.

klaus.trans: 那个小气鬼囚禁了那些鹿！

glassed.en: It looks like ice, but we think it's actually glass!
glassed.trans: 它看起来像冰，可是我们认为它其实是玻璃！

cave.en: The moon can't fit in a cave! I think.

generic.en: Hey, Ms. Wicker! How come we can still see the moon?
generic.trans: 嘿，威克女士！为什么我们还能看到月亮呢？

generic.en: Oh! Can we grind it, please?
generic.trans: 嗷！咱们磨点东西好不好？

quagmire_rubble_carriage.en: I wish we could ride in that.

quagmire_rubble_clock.en: Does it still tell the right time?
quagmire_rubble_clock.trans: 它还能正确显示时间吗？

generic.en: Hope we don't fall on that.

succulent_potted.en: I wonder if mum's ever seen one.
succulent_potted.trans: 我很好奇妈妈有没有见过这个。

generic.trans: 已经远远过了我们的睡觉时间！

boat_grass_item.en: Weaving a grass boat probably isn't much harder than weaving webs.
boat_grass_item.trans: 编条草船应该并不比编蜘蛛网难多少。

moonglassaxe.en: We think it cuts better than a regular axe.
moonglassaxe.trans: 我们觉得它应该比普通斧头锋利。

bodypillow_petals.en: It's the nicest pillow we've ever smelled!
bodypillow_petals.trans: 那是我们闻过最香的枕头！

pocket_scale.en: Wonder how heavy our fish is!
pocket_scale.trans: 不知道我们的鱼有多重！

giftwrap.en: I want to give someone something nice!
giftwrap.trans: 我想给某人某些好东西！

pond_algae.trans: 只是一株很普通的池塘植物。

quagmire_potato_cooked.trans: 现在它是煮熟的土豆了。

slingshot_frame_wagpunk_0.trans: 沃尔特的玩具是最好玩的。

barnacle_cooked.trans: 我们从来没有吃过藤壶。

quagmire_sapling.en: It's gonna take too long to grow back.
quagmire_sapling.trans: 它要过很长时间才会重新长出来。

milkywhites.trans: 可怜的朋友。不过看起来很好吃。

generic.en: This could feed us for days!
generic.trans: 这够我们好几天的伙食了！

eyemaskhat.en: We have even MORE eyes and teeth!
eyemaskhat.trans: 我们长着更多的眼睛和牙齿！

wx78module_bee.en: Huh. Is that what robot insides look like?
wx78module_bee.trans: 哈。机器人里面长这样啊？

wall_wood_item.en: They won't keep us safe if we keep holding them.
wall_wood_item.trans: 如果我们就这样拿着它们，那它们是没法保卫我们安全的。

meat.en: Some fire would spice this up.

locked.en: Someone's precious things are probably inside.
locked.trans: 也许里面藏着某人的珍贵物品。

generic.en: Well, it wouldn't hurt to take a look.
generic.trans: 好吧，看一看又没什么坏处。

rock_petrified_tree_old.en: It's all stone and no bark.

mask_dollbrokenhat.en: We can pretend to be somebody else!

yots_worm.trans: 你永远都抓不到我，蠕虫！

honeynuggets.en: We wish they were shaped like dinosaurs.
honeynuggets.trans: 我们希望它们的形状像恐龙。

staff_lunarplant.en: We can hit things far away.
staff_lunarplant.trans: 我们能打到远处的东西了。

armormarble.trans: 来自大理石的非凡保护！

firestarter.en: Don't light fires, %s!

ghost.en: Aw, we're sorry that happened to you, %s.
ghost.trans: 啊，很抱歉这发生在了你身上，%s。

murderer.en: Murderer! We didn't wanna have to do this!
murderer.trans: 凶手！我们是迫不得已的！

reviver.en: %s keeps us all together.

generic.trans: 嗨，%s！今天做了什么好东西吗？

charlie_npc.en: Are you the lady from the dark?
charlie_npc.trans: 你就是黑夜里来的女士吗？

yotc_carrat_gym_direction_item.en: We should find someplace to put this.
yotc_carrat_gym_direction_item.trans: 我们找个好地方放它吧。

pomegranate.en: I didn't expect this to grow.
pomegranate.trans: 我没有想到这个会长出来。

fossil_piece.trans: 我们想要扮演考古学家！

sharkboi.en: Maybe it just wants to play with us.
sharkboi.trans: 也许它就是想跟我们玩玩。

follower.en: I never knew we could be friends!
follower.trans: 我都没想过我们可以成为朋友！

dead.en: He won't bully us any more.
dead.trans: 他再也没法欺负我们了。

off.en: Maybe the night won't be as scary now.
off.trans: 也许夜晚不会像现在这么可怕了。

burnt.en: Aw. It was kinda growing on us.
burnt.trans: 噢。它有点儿长在我们身上了。

ready.en: Looks like there's a hole for an oversized key.
ready.trans: 看起来那里有一个用来插超大钥匙的孔。

shroombait.en: We're not afraid to try it.

scrap_monoclehat.en: We can see extra far with that on!
scrap_monoclehat.trans: 戴上它，我们能看得更远！

burnt.trans: 无论如何古董都很愚蠢。

empty.en: Reminds me of antique shopping with mother.
empty.trans: 让我想起和母亲去购买古玩的时候。

supertacklecontainer.en: We can put way more fishing stuff in there!
supertacklecontainer.trans: 我们可以把好多钓鱼的东西都放进去！

boat_bumper_kelp_kit.en: Now we can play bumper boats!
boat_bumper_kelp_kit.trans: 现在我们可以玩碰碰船了!

papyrus.trans: 我们可以用它来做家庭作业。

shadowthrall_parasite.en: Maybe it just wants a friend to play with.
shadowthrall_parasite.trans: 也许它只想有个一起玩的朋友……

chesspiece_dragonfly.en: We can practically feel the fire!
chesspiece_dragonfly.trans: 我们几乎能感觉到火焰！

moon_altar_idol.en: It doesn't want to be here. We don't either.
moon_altar_idol.trans: 它不喜欢这里，我们也不喜欢。

gestalt_guard_evolved.en: Why are they mad at us?
gestalt_guard_evolved.trans: 它们为什么生我们的气呀？

spicepack.en: I'm sure Mr. Warly won't mind if we use this!
spicepack.trans: 沃利肯定不介意我们用这个！

fused_shadeling_bomb.en: You're not one of our spider friends!
fused_shadeling_bomb.trans: 你不是我们的蜘蛛朋友！

mask_kinghat.en: We can pretend to be somebody else!

dug_trap_starfish.en: Now nobody will hurt themselves on it.

cold.trans: 可怜的蛋。它看上去很冷。

deflated.en: We have to hold on tight or it'll fly away!
deflated.trans: 我们要抓紧点，不然它就会飞走了！

generic.en: Circles must be the speediest shape.
generic.trans: 圆形一定是最快速的形状。

lavae_cocoon.en: Being all froze up probably isn't comfy.
lavae_cocoon.trans: 全部冻结起来可能不那么舒服。

froglegs_cooked.en: I admit, we've acquired a taste for those.
froglegs_cooked.trans: 我得承认，我们对那些东西有一种后天养成的嗜好。

diseased.en: Maybe it needs some chicken soup?

generic.en: Grass, next best thing to silk.
generic.trans: 草是世上仅次于蜘蛛丝的好东西。

barren.en: It could use some perking up.
barren.trans: 需要天气变好才能长出来。

quagmire_pond_salt.en: It's all crusty around the edges.
quagmire_pond_salt.trans: 它的边缘带有硬壳一般的质感。

carnival_plaza_kit.en: We need to find a good planting spot.
carnival_plaza_kit.trans: 我们需要找到一个好的种植地点。

barnaclinguine.en: Watch how fast we can slurp it up!
barnaclinguine.trans: 看我们能以多快的速度把它消灭！

wurt_swampitem_lunar.en: Wurt won't let us play with her mud wand, even after we shared our snacks!
wurt_swampitem_lunar.trans: 沃特不让我们玩她的泥巴棒，明明我们还跟她分享了零食！

sleeping.en: We don't want to get closer.

generic.en: It's even more monstrous than us!
We're going to go water the garden now!
generic.trans: 我们现在要去浇灌花园了！

empty.en: Hey, there's no water in it!

boatrace_seastack.trans: 小心！别撞到那个浮的东西！

body.en: It has more legs than us!

dustmothden.en: We never kept our room this clean.
dustmothden.trans: 我们的房间从来没有这么干净过。

eggplant_seeds.en: We could grow something with these.
eggplant_seeds.trans: 我们可以用这些种子种点东西出来。

winterhat.en: Mum always said I should take a cap with me.
winterhat.trans: 妈妈总是说我应该戴一顶帽子。

vegstinger.en: It's a drink with vegetables in it.

security_pulse_cage_full.en: Oooh it glows. Can we touch it?
security_pulse_cage_full.trans: 哦，它发光了。我们可以摸摸它吗？

penguin.en: Where do they live the rest of the year?
penguin.trans: 一年中的其他时候它们住在哪儿呢？

rainhat.en: It'll keep the water out of your fur.
rainhat.trans: 它将让你的皮毛不被水打湿。

reviving.en: W-we don't think that's supposed to happen!

generic.en: We shouldn't just leave him like that...
generic.trans: 我们不应该就这样离开他……

smallmeat_dried.trans: 做成肉干可以让肉保存更长时间。

quagmire_swampig_house_rubble.en: No one lives in it anymore.

marsh_plant.trans: 那是一株很口渴的植物。

kitcoon_forest.en: The minister's kit is an arborous kit!
kitcoon_forest.trans: 小猫猫，喵喵叫，脾气好，爱撒娇。

boatrace_seastack_monkey_throwable_deplo.en: Where should we throw the floaty?
boatrace_seastack_monkey_throwable_deplo.trans: 我们把这个浮的东西扔到哪好？

fishingrod.trans: 好怀念跟爷爷一起去钓鱼的日子。

boatpatch_kelp.en: It's for fixing up boat booboos!

book_tentacles.en: Why are the pages all slimy?
book_tentacles.trans: 为什么纸都是黏糊糊的？

burnt.en: Aww, we wanted to play dress-up...
burnt.trans: 嗷，我们本来想玩装扮游戏的……

generic.trans: 我们来玩一下乔装打扮吧！

off.en: Hey Winona! How do we fix it?
off.trans: 嗨，薇诺娜！我们怎么修好它呢？

diseased.en: It's got ouchies in its tummy.

generic.en: Woah! How'd you get rid of your outside skin?

shieldofterror.en: Ms. Wickerbottom says we shouldn't bite.
shieldofterror.trans: 薇克巴顿女士教育我们不能咬人。

wx78module_cold.en: Huh. Is that what robot insides look like?
wx78module_cold.trans: 哈。机器人里面长这样啊？

yellowstaff.en: We summon you, warm ball of light!
yellowstaff.trans: 我们召唤你，温暖的光团！

stash_map.trans: 这是一张真正的藏宝图！

line_1.en: We sure wish we knew what it says!
line_1.trans: 我们真希望能知道它在说什么！

line_5.en: We sure wish we knew what it says!
line_5.trans: 我们真希望能知道它在说什么！

line_3.en: We sure wish we knew what it says!
line_3.trans: 我们真希望能知道它在说什么！

meat_dried.trans: 效果比我们预期的要好。

fishingnet.trans: 兴许我们能抓到蚁头凤尾鱼！

pig_coin.en: Wow! We have our very own pig friend!
pig_coin.trans: 哇！我们有了自己的猪朋友！

generic.en: Do you have any fun things for us?
generic.trans: 你有什么好玩的给我们吗？

empty.en: We should give it a present!

eyebrellahat.en: Disturbing, but it'll keep us dry.
eyebrellahat.trans: 虽然有点令人不安，但它会保护我们不被雨淋湿。

playing_hideandseek_time_almost_up.en: We're almost out of time to find all of the babies...
playing_hideandseek_time_almost_up.trans: 我们快要没时间找全所有的宝宝了……

generic.en: A nice safe place for kitcoons to rest after playing.
generic.trans: 小浣猫们玩耍后休息的好地方。

burnt.trans: 希望里面的住户得到了疏散……

oceanfishableflotsam.en: Yuck, it's just a big chunk of mud!

bunnystew.en: We were told we can't lick it clean...
bunnystew.trans: 大人说我们不能舔盘子……

quagmire_garlic_seeds.en: We can find out what they are by planting them.
quagmire_garlic_seeds.trans: 种下它们，我们就会知道它们到底是什么。

carnival_crowkid.en: Are you a boy who was eaten by a crow?
carnival_crowkid.trans: 你是一个被乌鸦吃掉的男孩吗？

oceantreenut.en: It's almost as big as we are!

kitcoondecor2_kit.trans: 我们应该把它放在哪呢？

blowdart_fire.en: One step above blowing hot air.

quagmire_onion.en: It makes all our eyes water!
quagmire_onion.trans: 它弄得我们所有人都流眼泪了！

gelblob_bottle.trans: 黏黏的，像我们的网一样！

empty.en: We think it wants burnt stuff!
empty.trans: 我们猜它想要焦的东西！

quagmire_key.en: Cool! I wonder what it unlocks?
quagmire_key.trans: 太酷了！我想知道它能打开哪里的锁？

generic.en: Uh oh... we think we just made it madder...
generic.trans: 啊呀……我们让他变得更生气了……

quagmire_grill_small_item.en: Let's find a place to put it.

chesspiece_eyeofterror.en: We think we could've been friends.
chesspiece_eyeofterror.trans: 我们认为我们本可以成为朋友。

burnt.trans: 现在没那么舒适了吧，猪！

generic.en: A tall skinny house for a short fat pig.
generic.trans: 专门为矮小肥猪建造的高高猪皮屋。

full.en: I can see a pig through the window!
full.trans: 我可以透过窗户看到一头猪！

drying_notmeat.en: Is it done yet? I'm hungry.

drying.en: Is it done yet? I'm hungry.

dryinginrain_notmeat.en: It's hard to dry when it's raining.

dryinginrain.en: It's hard to dry when it's raining.

generic.en: It's not doing us much good empty!

tomato_seeds.en: We can find out what they are by planting them.
tomato_seeds.trans: 种下它们，我们就会知道它们到底是什么。

kitcoon_grass.en: The minister's kit is an eager kit!
kitcoon_grass.trans: 小猫猫，喵喵叫，脾气好，爱撒娇。

yoth_knightstick.en: We'll run fast as a horse!
yoth_knightstick.trans: 我们会跑得像马一样快！

icehat.trans: 这应该能让我们保持凉快。

marblebean_sapling.en: You can plant anything in the ground!
marblebean_sapling.trans: 你可以在土地上种植任何东西！

catcoon.en: A bit more feral than grandpa's cat.
catcoon.trans: 比爷爷的猫多了点野性。

quagmire_tomato_seeds.en: We can find out what they are by planting them.
quagmire_tomato_seeds.trans: 种下它们，我们就会知道它们到底是什么。

relic.en: These haven't been used in a while.
relic.trans: 这些东西有一段时间没用过了。

ghostlyelixir_fastregen.en: Hey, you didn't tell us you were making crafts!
ghostlyelixir_fastregen.trans: 嘿，你没告诉我你还会做东西呢！

yellowmooneye.en: Even with all our eyes, we'd still lose in a staring contest.
yellowmooneye.trans: 即使用上我们所有的眼睛，我们还是会输掉瞪眼比赛。

quagmire_salmon.en: Mom said fish oil is good for our brain.
quagmire_salmon.trans: 妈妈说过，鱼油对大脑有益。

statuemaxwell.en: We're still a little mad at him. But only a little.
statuemaxwell.trans: 我们对他还是有些生气。但就一点点。

armorwagpunk.en: Ms. Wickerbottom said to keep our fingers away from the gears.
armorwagpunk.trans: 威克巴顿女士说手指要注意远离齿轮。

dragonfruit.trans: 我有点怀疑它能不能吃。

bomb_lunarplant_wormwood.en: Wormwood did something special to it!
bomb_lunarplant_wormwood.trans: 沃姆伍德对它做了些什么！

polly_rogershat.en: We're the famous pirate Webbeard! Arr!
polly_rogershat.trans: 我们是大海盗韦伯胡子！哇呀呀！

wagpunkhat.en: What's one more voice in our head?
wagpunkhat.trans: 脑袋里多个声音怕什么？

stinger.en: We should be careful, we could poke an eye out!

hermithouse_laundry.trans: 我们要把它们藏到哪儿好呢？

generic.en: Can we press all the buttons?
generic.trans: 能不能所有按钮都按一下？

generic.en: Winona's been using those funny glasses a lot lately.
generic.trans: 薇诺娜最近经常用那副滑稽的眼镜。

lunarrift_crystal.en: They look like candy, but they're just rocks.
lunarrift_crystal.trans: 虽然看起来像糖，但其实只是石头。

steelwool.trans: 有些刺痒，就像爸爸的胡子！

waiting.trans: 他曾经是我们的新朋友。

oceanfishingbobber_robin_winter.en: We turned a feather into a float!
oceanfishingbobber_robin_winter.trans: 我们把羽毛变成了浮漂！

ancienttree_seed.en: We want to see what it grows into!
ancienttree_seed.trans: 我们想看看它能长出什么！

mutator_warrior.en: We just know they're going to love it!
mutator_warrior.trans: 我们就知道它们会喜欢它！

dreadstonehat.en: A pointy helmet to match our pointy teeth!
dreadstonehat.trans: 尖尖的头盔，刚好配我们尖尖的牙齿！

maxwellhead.en: Imagine the trouble he has buying hats!
maxwellhead.trans: 想象一下他买帽子该有多麻烦！

accomplishment_shrine.en: It gives me a goal in life.
accomplishment_shrine.trans: 它给了我一个为之奋斗的人生目标。

bell.en: Exactly the right amount of bell.

californiaroll.en: Hmm, something smells fishy about this!
californiaroll.trans: 唔，这里面有点难闻的鱼腥味！

yotb.en: We should show it to the judge!
yotb.trans: 我们应该把它给评委看！

quagmire_rotten_crop.en: That one got a bit squishy.
quagmire_rotten_crop.trans: 它变得有点黏糊糊的了。

seeds_cooked.trans: 它们生长的日子结束了。

book_fish.en: Will reading really make us better at fishing?
book_fish.trans: 读书真能让我们钓鱼变得更厉害吗？

sewing_kit.en: Mum used to handle all of our sewing.
sewing_kit.trans: 以前我们所有的针线活都是妈妈做的。

turnip_seeds.en: We can find out what they are by planting them.
turnip_seeds.trans: 种下它们，我们就会知道它们到底是什么。

out.en: It looks like it might break.
out.trans: 它看起来像要碎掉一样。

scandata.en: Wow, it learned all that just by looking really hard?
scandata.trans: 哇，它只要盯着看就能学到这么些东西？

wagstaff_tool_1.en: Is that the thing we're looking for?
wagstaff_tool_1.trans: 那个就是我们一直在找的东西吗？

wagstaff_tool_2.en: It looks like some kind of tool... maybe it's what he was looking for!
wagstaff_tool_2.trans: 它看起来像是某种工具……也许这就是他在找的东西！

wagstaff_tool_3.en: We found it! He'll be so happy!
wagstaff_tool_3.trans: 我们找到了！他一定会很开心！

butterflywings.en: Pick our teeth with butterfly bones.

armor_sanity.en: It's a bit uneasy wearing this, but so effective.
armor_sanity.trans: 虽然穿着有点不舒服，但很有效。

wagstaff_tool_4.en: We found a tool! Maybe it's the one he's looking for?
wagstaff_tool_4.trans: 我们找到一个工具了！也许这就是他在找的东西？

wagstaff_tool_5.en: Maybe this is what he was looking for?
wagstaff_tool_5.trans: 也许他想找到就是这个？

lavaarena_armorlight.en: Uhh, I don't think that's very safe.
lavaarena_armorlight.trans: 呃，我觉得那个不太安全。

panettone.en: Are we sure that isn't a fruitcake in disguise?
panettone.trans: 里面真的不是水果蛋糕吗？

dead.en: I spoke too soon. It smells worse now.
dead.trans: 我太早下结论了。现在它更难闻了。

slingshotammo_stinger.en: Do you want us to help clean up?

wx78module_maxhealth2.en: Huh. Is that what robot insides look like?
wx78module_maxhealth2.trans: 哈。机器人里面长这样啊？

book_fire.en: Willow keeps trying to burn it... we thought she'd like it!
book_fire.trans: 薇洛总想烧掉它……我们还以为她会喜欢呢！

steeringwheel_item.en: That's for making a steering wheel.
steeringwheel_item.trans: 多谢做这个方向舵出来！

quagmire_onion_seeds.en: We can find out what they are by planting them.
quagmire_onion_seeds.trans: 种下它们，我们就会知道它们到底是什么。

wall_stone.trans: 向建造营地的大师鞠躬！

torch.trans: 这应该能确保我们安全。

occupied.en: Mother said I could never sit still.

generic.en: Mother said I could never sit still.

glassblock.en: We think it's great and we love it.
glassblock.trans: 我们觉得这棒极了，我们喜欢。

chesspiece_sharkboi.en: They weren't so bad after we got to know them.
chesspiece_sharkboi.trans: 熟悉了他们之后就不觉得他们有多坏了。

generic.en: I don't think we should play with that...
generic.trans: 我认为我们不应该玩那个…..

armor_lunarplant_husk.en: We aren't allowed to play with that. It's just for Wormwood.
armor_lunarplant_husk.trans: 大人不准我们玩那个。这个是沃姆伍德专用的。

moonrockseed.en: Neat, it's a ball that floats by itself!
moonrockseed.trans: 很好，自己就能漂浮的球！

burnt.trans: 我觉得它一点都不准确。

generic.en: It must be powered by magic.
generic.trans: 它一定是用魔法驱动的。

frozenbananadaiquiri.en: We can pretend it's a milkshake!
frozenbananadaiquiri.trans: 我们可以假装它是奶昔！

beefalofeed.en: We take good care of our beefalo.
beefalofeed.trans: 我们会照顾好我们的皮弗娄牛。

nightcaphat.en: Father used to wear a nightcap just like that.
nightcaphat.trans: 爸爸以前也戴那样的睡帽。

picked.en: Don't worry lil guy, it'll grow back!
picked.trans: 别担心，小家伙，它会长回去！

diseased.en: Maybe it needs some chicken soup?

withered.en: I think the heat broke it.

punchingbag.en: Wigfrid's teaching us how to spar with it!
punchingbag.trans: 薇格弗德在教我们怎么拿它练手！

carnivaldecor_figure_kit_season2.en: We can't wait to see what's inside!
carnivaldecor_figure_kit_season2.trans: 我们等不及想看里面有什么！

lavaarena_eyecirclethat.en: It looks neat, but we don't want it.
lavaarena_eyecirclethat.trans: 看起来挺漂亮，但我们不想要。

turf_fungus_red.en: Some ground that we dug up.

voidcloth_umbrella.en: It keeps us dry, and gives us lots of shade!
voidcloth_umbrella.trans: 它让我们保持干燥，并为我们提供大量的阴凉！

costume_mirror_body.en: We can wear it in the play!

almost_done_cooking.en: We can't wait til it's done!

cooking.en: Should we set the table while it's cooking?
cooking.trans: 我们要先布置一下桌子吗？

sweatervest.trans: 这件背心穿上很好笑，而且弄得我发痒。

generic.en: We just wanted to be friends.
generic.trans: 我们只是想和你做朋友。

firecrackers.en: Don't worry Ms. Wicker, we'll be careful.
firecrackers.trans: 威克女士，别担心，我们会小心的。

generic.en: Do you have any fun things for us to play with?
generic.trans: 你有什么有意思的东西给我们玩吗？

empty.en: Please don't bite us, we'll find something tastier for you to eat!
empty.trans: 请不要咬我们，我们会找到好吃的东西给你！

horn.en: If this makes a mating call we're all in trouble.
horn.trans: 如果这个发出求偶叫声，那我们就有麻烦了。

purplegem.en: I can see knowledge swimming inside.
purplegem.trans: 我可以看到知识在里面徜徉。

tophat_magician.en: Not quite like father used to wear.
tophat_magician.trans: 不像父亲以前戴的那顶。

lavaarena_armormediumrecharger.trans: 这副盔甲看起来相当好！

livingtree_sapling.en: It's a monster kid. Like me!
livingtree_sapling.trans: 它是个怪兽宝宝。跟我一样！

farm_plow_item.en: We'll find a good spot for the garden.
farm_plow_item.trans: 我们会找个适合建花园的好地方的。

corn_oversized.trans: 我们可以做巨型爆米花吗？

hermitcrabtea_forgetmelots.en: For when we feel really funny.
hermitcrabtea_forgetmelots.trans: 等我们感觉不对劲的时候喝。

charging.en: We didn't play with it. We swear.
charging.trans: 我们没有玩过它。我们发誓。

charged.en: We didn't play with it. We swear.
charged.trans: 我们没有玩过它。我们发誓。

generic.en: We didn't play with it. We swear.
generic.trans: 我们没有玩过它。我们发誓。

oceanvine.en: Maybe we could use that for a swing!
oceanvine.trans: 也许我们可以拿那个来做个秋千！

pumpkin_lantern.en: Just like we used to make at home!
pumpkin_lantern.trans: 就像我们以前在家里做的一样！

lavaarena_healingflowerhat.en: It makes your day a little brighter.
lavaarena_healingflowerhat.trans: 它为你的一天增添一点绚丽色彩。

dumbbell_golden.en: It looks so easy when Mr. Wolfgang does it...
dumbbell_golden.trans: 沃尔夫冈先生做的时候看起来很容易……

shellweaver.en: Ms. Pearl taught us to make lots of things with salt!
shellweaver.trans: 珍珠女士教我们用盐做好多东西！

inactive.en: Something about this rock feels off.
inactive.trans: 感觉这根石柱的什么东西消失了。

merm.en: I would've thought they would bathe more often!
merm.trans: 我本以为它们更经常洗澡！

slingshotammo_horrorfuel.en: Do you want us to help clean up?

oceanfishingrod.en: Wonder what kind of fish we'll catch!
oceanfishingrod.trans: 不知道会抓到什么样的鱼呢！

generic.en: We're glad it's just a statue!
generic.trans: 我们很高兴它只是个雕像！

portablefirepit_item.en: We can stay warm and cozy on our adventures!
portablefirepit_item.trans: 我们可以在冒险中保持温暖和舒适了！

carnivaldecor_banner.en: Crows sure like shiny things, don't they?
carnivaldecor_banner.trans: 乌鸦特别喜欢闪亮的东西，对不对？

backpack.en: It's like a second abdomen we can store things in.
backpack.trans: 它就像我们的第二个肚子，里面可以装东西。

wagpunk_lever.en: It's our turn to pull it!
wagpunk_lever.trans: 总算轮到我们来拉它了！

fence.en: I don't think we can jump over that.
fence.trans: 我觉得我们跳不过那东西。

wx78module_maxsanity1.en: Huh. Is that what robot insides look like?
wx78module_maxsanity1.trans: 哈。机器人里面长这样啊？

hambat.en: An interesting way to use food.
hambat.trans: 一种利用食物的有趣方式。

pumpkin_seeds.en: We could grow something with these.
pumpkin_seeds.trans: 我们可以用这些种子种点东西出来。

slingshot_band_mimic.trans: 沃尔特的玩具是最好玩的。

reskin_tool.en: Awww do we have to clean?

festive_blueprint.en: This is going to be so much fun!

burning.en: What a senseless waste of firewood.

diseased.en: Maybe it needs some chicken soup?

chopped.en: Would a cool bandage make you feel better, Mr. Tree?
chopped.trans: 急救绷带会让你感觉好些吗，树先生？

burnt.en: Only we can prevent forest fires.
burnt.trans: 只有我们能防止森林火灾。

book_silviculture.en: What else is there to know about trees?
book_silviculture.trans: 关于树木还有什么需要了解的？

mashedpotatoes.en: Just like grandma used to make!
mashedpotatoes.trans: 就像奶奶从前做的一样！

generic.en: We feel bad just leaving him like that...
generic.trans: 就这样丢下他让我们心里很难受……

webberskull.trans: 这东西是怎么到这里来的？

lavaarena_feathercrownhat.en: That might make us scuttle faster.
lavaarena_feathercrownhat.trans: 它或许能让我们跑得更快。

turf_forest.en: Some ground that we dug up.

hareball.trans: 讨厌！这个大冒险真过分！

decor_centerpiece.en: Is it a toy for us?

stalagmite_tall.trans: 长在地下的尖岩石？！难以置信。

chesspiece_antlion.en: It's so life-like the mane looks fluffy!
chesspiece_antlion.trans: 栩栩如生，鬃毛看起来很蓬松!

wagboss_robot_constructionsite.en: Maybe it won't be so cranky this time.
wagboss_robot_constructionsite.trans: 也许它这次不会乱发脾气。

lunar_seed.en: So pretty! Can we keep it?
lunar_seed.trans: 好漂亮！我们可以留下吗？

shadowdancer.en: We'll dance with you, Mr. Shadow!
shadowdancer.trans: 我们跟你一起跳舞，影子先生！

generic.en: We'll be careful with the saw!

wormwood_mutantproxy_lightflier.en: We think it's probably too big to fit in a jar.
wormwood_mutantproxy_lightflier.trans: 我们认为它可能太大了装不进罐子里。

plantregistryhat.en: It's teaching us so much about plants!
plantregistryhat.trans: 它正在教我们很多关于植物的知识!

held.en: Don't worry, we won't eat you.
held.trans: 别担心，我们不会吃了你。

generic_smallstack.en: Maybe now we can go get a prize!
generic_smallstack.trans: 也许现在我们可以去领奖了！

generic_largestack.en: It's a good thing we have extra arms to carry all these tickets!
generic_largestack.trans: 好在我们有多余的手臂来搬这些奖品！

costume_doll_body.en: We can wear it in the play!

burnt.en: It's in worse shape than before!

spore_moon.en: They pop like balloons! Not as fun, though.
spore_moon.trans: 它们会像气球一样爆裂！不过没气球好玩。

oceanfishinglure_hermit_snow.en: Fishing in the snow might be fun!
oceanfishinglure_hermit_snow.trans: 雪里游的鱼一定很好玩！

ready.en: I think it's stuck in there.

covered.en: It's a bit scary, but we don't like to judge.
covered.trans: 有点儿吓人，但我们不喜欢评判。

finished.en: Oh! That piece was his nose.

boatrace_spectator_dragonling.en: It's nice of him to cheer us on.

generic.en: We can't read what it says!

turf_carpetfloor.en: Carpets! Just like in our old house.
turf_carpetfloor.trans: 地毯！就跟我们的老房子一样。

turf_rocky.en: Some ground that we dug up.

horrorfuel.en: It makes our spider skin crawl.
horrorfuel.trans: 它让我们的蜘蛛毛都竖了起来。

held.en: Not so happy now, are we?

generic.en: Look at it, flitting around happily.

turf_shellbeach.en: Some ground that we dug up.

generic.en: It's just a boring planter without a tree.
generic.trans: 只是一个没有树的无聊的种植园主。

chesspiece_deerclops_mutated.en: It looks so real, it gives us the shivers!
chesspiece_deerclops_mutated.trans: 太逼真了，我们看了直发抖！

eggplant_cooked.en: Mum knew I liked it braised.
eggplant_cooked.trans: 妈妈知道我喜欢吃烤熟的茄子。

vault_chandelier_broken.trans: 下一个就会砸到我们了！

moon_altar_ward.en: It's lonely, it wants its friends.

chesspiece_depthworm.en: Can we play with this worm?
chesspiece_depthworm.trans: 我们可以和这条蠕虫玩吗？

slingshotammo_dreadstone.en: Do you want us to help clean up?

ancienttree_sapling_item.en: We're going to find a good home for you!
ancienttree_sapling_item.trans: 我们会为你找个好家的！

ready.en: I think it's stuck in there.

rock_avocado_fruit.en: We have to wait for it to ripen.

fish.en: It could stand to be fried.

dragonfruit_seeds.en: We could grow something with these.
dragonfruit_seeds.trans: 我们可以用这些种子种点东西出来。

generic.en: Whew... we thought there might be an angry clam inside.
generic.trans: 哎呦……我们还以为里面有一只生气的水蚌呢。

critter_lamb.en: Father taught me how to take care of goats!
critter_lamb.trans: 父亲教我如何照顾山羊！

snurtle.trans: 让我们去灭了那只蜗牛龟。

alterguardian_phase3deadorb.en: Watch out! It might get back up!
alterguardian_phase3deadorb.trans: 小心点！它可能会再起来！

oceanfishinglure_hermit_drowsy.en: It makes our head feel fuzzy... fuzzier than normal.
oceanfishinglure_hermit_drowsy.trans: 它让我们的头感到晕晕的……比平时还晕。

wormlight_plant.trans: 总感觉有什么不对劲呢？

oceanwhirlportal.trans: 我们可喜欢坐旋转船啦！

stalker_atrium.en: We'll defend ourselves if we have to.
stalker_atrium.trans: 如果有必要，我们会进行自卫。

bishop.en: You don't play by the chess rules grandpa taught me.
bishop.trans: 你没按爷爷教的规则下棋。

empty.en: Reminds me of antique shopping with mother.
empty.trans: 让我想起和母亲去购买古玩的时候。

generic.en: It's got a little night light inside!

figkabab.en: We like to play swords with the stick when we're done.
figkabab.trans: 吃完以后，我们想拿这根木棍耍剑。

quagmire_food_burnt.en: It's okay. The next one will be better.

shadow_battleaxe.trans: 我们会小心的。我们保证！

generic.en: We thought we saw something skitter inside it!
generic.trans: 我们好像看到里面有东西在动！

onion_cooked.en: Our eyes don't water any more.

generic.en: It makes us want to hum along.

yotd_steeringwheel.en: Can we steer for the race? Pleeeaase?
yotd_steeringwheel.trans: 我们来控制方向舵好不好？求求你了？

flotationcushion.trans: 我们保证不会把水花溅得到处都是……

wobster_sheller.en: We'd better stay away from the pinchy bits.
wobster_sheller.trans: 我们还是离这些会掐人的东西远点。

turf_woodfloor.en: If we put these on the ground we'll have a floor!
turf_woodfloor.trans: 把这些放在地上之后，我们就有地板啦！

burning.en: I hope trees don't feel pain.
burning.trans: 我希望树木不会感到疼痛。

seeds.en: A small life trapped within. My sympathies.
seeds.trans: 一个小生命就这样被困在里面。真是可怜。

pig_token.en: Neat! The Pig King would like that.

imprisoned.en: He doesn't look like a normal pig. Or even a normal werepig.
imprisoned.trans: 他看起来不像是一头普通猪。连普通的猪人都不是。

generic.en: Hey! We were just trying to help!!
A statue of some weird bug.

empty.en: Take that, rock bug!

deserthat.en: It covers our biggest eyes, anyway.
deserthat.trans: 不管怎样，它覆盖了我们最大的眼睛。

gems.trans: 它需要一些闪亮的东西！

mastupgrade_lamp_item.en: Now our boat has a light!
mastupgrade_lamp_item.trans: 现在我们的小船有灯了！

armorgrass.en: It just feels like more hair.

gestalt_guard.trans: 他们看起来不是很友好。

firestarter.en: You're supposed to put fires out when you're finished.
firestarter.trans: 你完成后应该把火灭掉。

ghost.en: Wow! Even as a ghost you're super tough, %s!
ghost.trans: 哇！就算是个鬼魂，你也超级结实，%s！

murderer.en: We're not scared of pointy spearsticks! Fight!
murderer.trans: 我们不害怕尖头棒！战斗！

reviver.en: %s is a super valiant lady.

yoth_chair_rocking_item.en: Do we get two turns on it?

match_but_snack.en: This is what it wants, but it's kinda puny.
match_but_snack.trans: 这是它想要的，就是有点少。

mismatch.en: We think the Gnaw wants something different.
mismatch.trans: 我们觉得它不是饕餮想要的。

match.en: The goat lady said this was what the Gnaw wanted.
match.trans: 山羊女士说，这是饕餮想要的。

generic.en: We can put it on the altar now.
generic.trans: 我们现在可以把它放在祭坛上了。

generic.en: Hey, can we be the king? We can take turns!
generic.trans: 嘿，让我当皇帝好吗？我们可以轮着来！

flower_cave.en: Oooh, a glowing ball of flower!

spider_spitter.en: Lay down some web for us.
spider_spitter.trans: 给我们吐点蜘蛛丝出来。

cooking_long.en: It won't be done for a while.
cooking_long.trans: 还要好一会儿才能做好。

burnt.en: Someone must have left the fire going.
burnt.trans: 一定是有人忘记了关火。

empty.en: Food goes in, other food comes out.
empty.trans: 放一些食材进去，就会得到经过烹饪的食物。

costume_queen_body.en: We can wear it in the play!

armordreadstone.en: It's kinda scary, but it keeps us safe!
armordreadstone.trans: 它虽然有些吓人，但却能守护我们的安全！

chesspiece_malbatross.en: Not such a big bad bird now!

yotb_sewingmachine_item.en: We just need to set it up first.

onion_seeds.en: We can find out what they are by planting them.
onion_seeds.trans: 种下它们，我们就会知道它们到底是什么。

burning.en: That probably isn't good for it.

full_weed.en: Hey, you're not a fruit or a veggie!
full_weed.trans: 嘿，你既不是水果，也不是蔬菜!

growing.en: It'll be big in no time!

full_oversized.en: Wow, look how big it got!

rotten.en: Uh oh... we probably should've picked it earlier.
rotten.trans: 呃，哦……我们也许应该早点采摘的。

full.en: Yay, it's ready to be picked!

ancientfruit_gem.en: It's too hard to take a bite out of.
ancientfruit_gem.trans: 这么硬，找不到地方咬一口。

robot_puppet.en: I don't think they're having fun.
robot_puppet.trans: 我觉得它一点都不开心。

generic.en: It's a box with bees in it.
generic.trans: 一个里面有蜜蜂的箱子。

burnt.en: The site of The Great Honey Fire.
burnt.trans: 我的蜂蜜就这样烧没了。

spiderden_bedazzler.en: We know what'll make our spiderfriends happy, decorating their house!
spiderden_bedazzler.trans: 我们知道怎样让我们的蜘蛛朋友开心，那就是装饰它们的房子！

oceanfish_medium_9.en: Look, it has a little mustache!
oceanfish_medium_9.trans: 快看呐，它长了一撮小胡子！

wagboss_robot_constructionsite_kit.en: A fun and dangerous toy to build!
wagboss_robot_constructionsite_kit.trans: 来做一个有趣的危险玩具吧！

balloons_empty.en: Is there going to be a party?!

oceanfish_medium_7.en: It looks like it has whiskers!

oceanfish_medium_6.en: It looks like it has whiskers!

oceanfish_medium_5.en: Does this count as eating our vegetables?

oceanfish_medium_4.en: This one was really tough to catch.

oceanfish_medium_3.trans: 呀，这个看起来会刺到人！

wathgrithr_shield.en: Will it protect us from getting squashed?
wathgrithr_shield.trans: 它能保护我们不被压扁吗？

oceanfish_medium_2.en: You'd be pretty tasty with some chips.

petrified_tree.en: It's all stone and no bark.

seedpouch.en: We're gonna fill it with seeds!
seedpouch.trans: 我们用种子来把它填满！

blowdart_yellow.en: It's a shock to the system.

lightflier.en: We think it's probably too big to fit in a jar.
lightflier.trans: 我们认为它可能太大了装不进罐子里。

generic.en: We never knew clocks could be so dangerous.
generic.trans: 我们从来不知道钟表原来这么危险。

lavaarena_healinggarlandhat.en: It makes you feel a little better when you wear it.
lavaarena_healinggarlandhat.trans: 戴着它的时候你会感觉好一点。

wrongstaff.en: I don't think it wanted that.
wrongstaff.trans: 我不认为它想要那东西。

staffed.en: Something else needs to happen, right?
staffed.trans: 需要发生些什么事，对吗？

bedroll_furry.en: I miss being able to properly feel a nice bedroll.
bedroll_furry.trans: 真怀念能够裹着睡袋睡觉的日子。

yotr_decor_1_item.en: It'd be a good night light.

generic.en: We didn't know magnets grew that big!
generic.trans: 我们不知道磁铁会长得那么大！

dragonheadhat.en: The front part's sort of scary.

farm_hoe.en: We need that to plant the seeds.

chesspiece_twinsofterror.trans: 现在他们会永远在一起了。

book_temperature.en: Not too hot, not too cold, just right! Have we heard this story before?
book_temperature.trans: 既不热，也不冷，恰到好处！我们以前听过这个故事吗？

plant.trans: 总感觉有什么不对劲呢？

dirt.trans: 一堆泥土，没什么大不了。

mooseegg.en: That would make a huge breakfast!
mooseegg.trans: 那可以做成一顿丰盛的早餐！

batbat.en: Flap that bat like you were born to do it.
batbat.trans: 挥舞那蝙蝠之翼吧，就像你天生就会做的那样。

dead.trans: 我们不是很称职的看守人。

sleeping.en: You have to sleep to survive in the jail.
sleeping.trans: 你必须睡觉才能在牢笼里生存下来。

onion_oversized.en: It's making all of our eyes tear up!
onion_oversized.trans: 让我们的眼睛都流眼泪了！

fish_box.en: It's like an aquarium! Except we eat the fish...
fish_box.trans: 跟水族馆一样！不过我们会吃掉这些鱼……

bloom.en: Hahah! Wow, it smells so bad!
bloom.trans: 哈哈哈！唔，它闻起来气味好糟糕！

moonrockidol.en: It looks kinda like an alien.

yotb.en: We should show it to the judge!
yotb.trans: 我们应该把它给评委看！

beast_blueprint.en: Another costume for our lucky beefalo!
beast_blueprint.trans: 我们的幸运皮弗娄牛又会多一件礼服了！

burnt.en: That's what happens when you don't play nice!
burnt.trans: 这就是不礼貌玩耍的下场！

generic.en: We don't want to play in those jerks' tree house! Even if it does look like fun...
generic.trans: 我们不想在那些坏蛋的树屋里玩! 不过看起来很有趣啊……

generic.en: Machines think gem power is really tasty.
generic.trans: 机器们觉得宝石的力量很好吃。

lavaarena_armor_hp.en: We should armor up to be safe.
lavaarena_armor_hp.trans: 安全起见，我们应该穿上盔甲。

generic.en: We don't think it's trying to play.
Would we change anything if we could go back in time?
generic.trans: 如果时间能倒回，我们会改变什么吗？

shadowrift_portal.en: W-we don't think we want to look down there...

playing.en: Don't worry bird mom, all your babies will get fed.
playing.trans: 别担心鸟妈妈，你所有的宝宝都会被喂到。

generic.en: It'll let us play if we give it something shiny.
generic.trans: 如果我们给它闪亮的东西，它就会让我们玩。

lunarplant_kit.en: Mum would be proud to see how good we are at this!
lunarplant_kit.trans: 看到我们做得这么好妈妈会很自豪的！

messagebottleempty.en: It's like the jars grandma used for her preserves.
messagebottleempty.trans: 像奶奶以前腌咸菜的瓶子。

mask_sagehat.en: Ooooh, they'll never guess it's us!
mask_sagehat.trans: 噢，谁都猜不到会是我们！

book_horticulture_upgraded.en: It'll take us forever to read that!
book_horticulture_upgraded.trans: 我们得要很久才能看完！

spat.en: Maybe it just needs a cuddle!
spat.trans: 也许它只需要一个拥抱！

yoth_lance.en: We are supposed to run with this sharp object!
yoth_lance.trans: 我们就是要拿着这么尖的东西跑来跑去！

kitcoon_rocky.en: The minister's kit is a ferrous kit!
kitcoon_rocky.trans: 小猫猫，喵喵叫，脾气好，爱撒娇。

boatrace_start.en: Last one back here is a rotten egg!

blowdart_lava.en: We like fighting from far away.

turf_fungus_green.en: Some ground that we dug up.

wobster_moonglass.en: That's not how they usually look, is it?
wobster_moonglass.trans: 他们平时应该不是这个样子吧？

bullkelp_root.en: It would be happier if we planted it.
bullkelp_root.trans: 我们把它种一下，它会开心点。

armor_yoth_knight.en: Ooh, this will keep us safe!

earmuffshat.en: Strap some rabbits to your head, good idea.
earmuffshat.trans: 绑几只兔子戴在你的头上，好主意。

moonspiderden.en: They're not so bad once you get to know them.
moonspiderden.trans: 一旦你熟悉了，你就知道它们也没什么差。

spider_dropper.trans: 我们的朋友住在那上面。

alterguardian_phase3dead.en: We're not sure what he did, but it doesn't look like it's getting up again!
alterguardian_phase3dead.trans: 我们也不知道他做了什么，不过看起来它不会再站起来了！

1.en: We're a bit old for playing peek-a-boo.
1.trans: 我们已经过了玩躲猫猫的年纪了。

2.en: We're a bit old for playing peek-a-boo.
2.trans: 我们已经过了玩躲猫猫的年纪了。

1.en: We're a bit old for playing peek-a-boo.
1.trans: 我们已经过了玩躲猫猫的年纪了。

2.en: We're a bit old for playing peek-a-boo.
2.trans: 我们已经过了玩躲躲猫的年纪了。

1.en: We're a bit old for playing peek-a-boo.
1.trans: 我们已经过了玩躲猫猫的年纪了。

2.en: We're a bit old for playing peek-a-boo.
2.trans: 我们已经过了玩躲猫猫的年纪了。

bananabush.en: We didn't know bananas could grow outside!
bananabush.trans: 我们以前都不知道香蕉还能长在外面！

shadowthrall_wings.en: Aww, no fair, we wish we had wings!
shadowthrall_wings.trans: 嗷，不公平，我们也想要翅膀！

sleep.trans: 薇诺娜做的玩具是最棒的！

generic.trans: 薇诺娜做的玩具是最棒的！

sleeping.trans: 真是粗心大意的两栖动物。

generic.trans: 也许他们会邀请我们进去？

empty.en: I think someone was here.
empty.trans: 我猜这里以前有人住过。

dug_bananabush.en: We didn't know bananas could grow outside!
dug_bananabush.trans: 我们以前都不知道香蕉还能长在外面！

treegrowthsolution.en: If only we had some peanut butter.
treegrowthsolution.trans: 我们现在要是有点花生酱有好了。

fence_rotator.en: We're allowed to hit fence posts with it, just not too hard.
fence_rotator.trans: 准许我们用它来敲栅栏杆，但是不能太用力。

slingshotammo_gunpowder.en: Do you want us to help clean up?

wx78module_heat.en: Huh. Is that what robot insides look like?
wx78module_heat.trans: 哈。机器人里面长这样啊？

grassgator.en: We don't think it wants to be friends with us.
grassgator.trans: 我们觉得它不想跟我们做朋友。

moqueca.en: We love when Warly cooks for us.
moqueca.trans: 沃利做东西给我们吃，我们好开心。

telestaff.en: Just looking at it makes my brain feel fuzzy.
telestaff.trans: 看着它就使我的脑袋昏昏沉沉的。

yotr_token.en: We shouldn't start fights... but do pillow fights count?
yotr_token.trans: 我们不能找人打架……但打枕头架算吗？

molehat.en: It sees for miles and miles.
molehat.trans: 它可以看到很远很远的地方。

fence_item.trans: 我们来制造一个栅栏吧！

tentaclespike.en: We could hit stuff with the pointy bits!
tentaclespike.trans: 我们可以用尖锐部位击打其他东西！

marblepillar.en: Nothing lasts forever on its own.
marblepillar.trans: 任何东西本身无法永久持续。

squid.en: Wish we had eyes like that!
squid.trans: 我们要是也有那样的眼睛就好了！

teleportato_potato.en: It looks like this goes with something...
teleportato_potato.trans: 似乎这个东西要和其他东西配合使用...

saltlick.en: We really regret licking it. Blech.
saltlick.trans: 我们真后悔舔了那东西。恶心啊。

pond.en: Water doesn't go well with our fur.
pond.trans: 池塘里的水和我们身上的皮毛可不怎么和谐。

bombed.en: We promise not to splash! Maybe.
bombed.trans: 我们保证不把水溅出去！尽量吧。

empty.en: Aw, it's all dried up.

victorian_blueprint.en: It's so fancy! We hope it's not too hard to make...
victorian_blueprint.trans: 好花哨啊！希望做起来不是太难……

dreadstone.en: We're not sure if we like that rock.
dreadstone.trans: 我们不确定我们是否喜欢那块石头。

merm_toolshed_upgraded.en: Aww, how come we're not allowed inside?
merm_toolshed_upgraded.trans: 嗷，为什么不让我们进去？

burnt.en: We can't take a nap in that!
burnt.trans: 这东西没法用来睡午觉！

malbatross_feathered_weave.en: We used our nicest spider silk!
malbatross_feathered_weave.trans: 我们用了我们最好的蛛丝！

waxed_plant.trans: 它会永远保持那个样子！

spider_water.en: Maybe they can teach us how to swim.
spider_water.trans: 也许它们可以教我们游泳。

boat_bumper_crabking.en: Now we will win bumper boats!
boat_bumper_crabking.trans: 这下我们玩碰碰船就不会输了！

quagmire_spotspice_ground.trans: 我们把这些全部磨碎了。

spider_healer_item.en: It's good for fixing spider booboos.
spider_healer_item.trans: 它对修复蜘蛛伤口有好处。

ghost.en: Oh no, %s! You're hurt!
ghost.trans: 哎呀，%s！你受伤了！

firestarter.en: Don't play tricks, Mr. Imp!

murderer.en: Oh no! %s, what did you do!
murderer.trans: 哎呀！%s，你都干了些什么！

reviver.en: Grandpa always said laughter was the best medicine!
reviver.trans: 爷爷总是说微笑是最好的药品。

generic.trans: 嘿，%s！你的角看起来真不错！

dock_woodposts_item.trans: 我们差点忘了这些柱子！

firestarter.en: Don't burn our things please. We like them.
firestarter.trans: 不要烧掉我们的东西。我们喜欢它们。

ghost.en: Aw %s, no one deserves to be stuck like that!
ghost.trans: 哦，%s ，没有人应该被那样困住！

murderer.en: You're the real monster, %s!
murderer.trans: 你是个地道的怪物，%s！

reviver.en: Wow, %s is really nice! He's helping people!

purebrilliance.en: It's blinding our poor spider eyes!
purebrilliance.trans: 亮瞎我们可怜的蜘蛛眼了！

mask_treehat.en: We can pretend to be somebody else!
