fishmeat_small_dried.en: It's really chewy, but we don't mind!

nonslipgritboosted.en: We're gonna sprinkle it all over, so nobody slips!
nonslipgritboosted.trans: 我们要到处撒一点，这样大家就都不会滑倒！

picked.trans: 我觉得应该还有一些孢子。

inground.en: We can't get at it like that.

burning.en: We guess it's better this way.

generic.en: Looking at it makes us feel kind of sad.
generic.trans: 看着它，我们感到有点难过。

junk_pile.en: There might be something fun to play with in there!
junk_pile.trans: 也许有一些好玩的东西在里面！

maxwellphonograph.en: We could listen to that forever!

decor_lamp.en: It's so bright for our eyes.
decor_lamp.trans: 它对我们的眼睛来说太亮了。

carrot.en: I sort of miss being forced to eat these.
carrot.trans: 我有点怀念被迫吃下这些东西的日子。

wagdrone_parts.en: Can we use that to fix a broken one?
wagdrone_parts.trans: 我们可以用这个修好坏掉的机器吗？

upgraded_stacksize.en: It's way bigger and better than my old toy chest!
upgraded_stacksize.trans: 比我的旧玩具箱更大更好！

generic.en: It looks like my old toy chest!
generic.trans: 它看起来像我以前的玩具箱！

someone_else_won.en: Woah, {winner}! How did you teach your Carrat to race like that?
someone_else_won.trans: 哇， {winner}! 你是怎么教你的胡萝卜鼠跑步的？

burnt.en: The firecrackers might have been a bad idea after all...
burnt.trans: 放鞭炮果然不是什么好主意……

generic.en: We hope our little friend doesn't get lost on the way.
generic.trans: 我希望我们的小伙伴不会在路上迷路。

unwritten.trans: 哦哦喔！我们该说些什么呢？

generic.en: We could write on that if only we had a pen!
generic.trans: 要是有支笔，我们就可以在上面写点什么了！

nitre_formation.en: It's a big stack of rock stuff!

wortox_souljar.en: Are there spider souls in there?

lightninggoathorn.en: This might make a good weapon.
lightninggoathorn.trans: 这没准儿能做成一把好武器。

yotr_decor_2_item.en: It'd be a good night light.

quagmire_carrot_seeds.en: We can find out what they are by planting them.
quagmire_carrot_seeds.trans: 种下它们，我们就会知道它们到底是什么。

book_fossil.en: We can read the words but we can't make them work.
book_fossil.trans: 我们会念这些字，但是没法让它们发挥作用。

beeswax_spray.en: We're only allowed to spray it on plants.
beeswax_spray.trans: 只允许我们在植物上喷洒。

ready.en: I think it's stuck in there.

covered.en: I think it really ties the island together.
covered.trans: 我认为它真的把岛屿系在一起了。

chestupgrade_stacksize.en: Will this make our toy chest bigger?
chestupgrade_stacksize.trans: 这会让我们的玩具箱变大吗？

chesspiece_pawn.en: Pawns are just as important as the rest of the pieces.
chesspiece_pawn.trans: 小兵和其他棋子一样重要。

carnivalgame_feedchicks_food.en: We think Wurt might eat these too.
carnivalgame_feedchicks_food.trans: 我们觉得沃特可能也吃这些。

moonglass.en: It came from the moon. Wow!

mask_ancient_masonhat.en: It must have been worn by someone big and strong.

yotb_stage.en: Hello Mr. Judge? Can we start the contest now?
yotb_stage.trans: 你好，裁判先生。我们可以开始比赛了吗？

funny.en: Maybe we shouldn't play with bones.
funny.trans: 也许我们不应该玩骨头。

carnivalgame_herding_kit.en: We can help the birds set up.
carnivalgame_herding_kit.trans: 我们可以帮鸟儿们组装。

quagmire_potato_seeds.en: We can find out what they are by planting them.
quagmire_potato_seeds.trans: 种下它们，我们就会知道它们到底是什么。

hermit_cracked_pearl.en: We hope Ms. Pearl isn't too mad at us...
hermit_cracked_pearl.trans: 我们希望珍珠女士别太生我们气……

off.en: It still needs to be turned on.

on.en: It's giving off a nice light.
on.trans: 它正发出一种好看的亮光。

record_end.en: It makes us want to do a little dance!
record_end.trans: 这让我们想跳一支小舞！

goldenpitchfork.en: We can do some fancy forking with this.
goldenpitchfork.trans: 有了这个，我们就可以花式铲地皮了。

asparagus_seeds.en: Do we have a garden to plant this?
asparagus_seeds.trans: 我们有花园来种这个吗？

kelp_cooked.en: He doesn't like it very much, but I think it's okay.
kelp_cooked.trans: 他不是很喜欢，不过我觉得还可以。

kitcoonden_kit.en: We can use this to build a little house for the kitcoons.
kitcoonden_kit.trans: 我们可以用它为小浣猫建造一个小房子。

powcake.en: Mum never let me have these.
powcake.trans: 妈妈从来不让我吃这些的。

generic.en: Would we change anything if we could go back in time?
generic.trans: 如果时间能倒回，我们会改变什么吗？

burnt.en: It will be of no use to us in that state.
burnt.trans: 烧毁后的雕像对我们没什么用。

generic.en: It's a giant doll of our friend!!
generic.trans: 这是我们朋友的大洋娃娃！！

alterguardianhatshard.en: Uh oh... maybe we can paste them back together?
alterguardianhatshard.trans: 哎呀……也许我们能把它们再粘起来？

oceanfishinglure_hermit_rain.en: Do fish know when it's raining?

builtup.en: She must be sad living here all alone...
builtup.trans: 她一个人住在这里一定很悲伤……

generic.en: We hope this makes her feel happier!
generic.trans: 我们希望这个会让她开心一点！

generic.en: We've never seen toys so big.
generic.trans: 我们从来没有看过这么大的玩具。

activated.trans: 它在闪光！这是好事，对吗？

shadowheart.en: Why does it make me feel so bad?
shadowheart.trans: 为什么它让我感觉这么不舒服？

sweettea.en: Mother used to make tea for me... at least I think she did...
sweettea.trans: 妈妈以前经常给我泡茶……至少我觉得她是给我泡的……

generic.en: I think that thing is alive.
generic.trans: 我觉得那个东西是活的。

open.trans: 更糟糕的地方我都去过了。

leafloaf.en: Not quite how mother used to make it.
leafloaf.trans: 不太像妈妈以前做的那样。

battlesong_instant_panic.en: The characters talk just like Wigfrid!
battlesong_instant_panic.trans: 这口气简直和薇格弗德一模一样！

hermitcrabtea_petals_evil.trans: 这个让我们感觉不对劲。

pondfish.en: It could stand to be fried.

wathgrithrhat.en: Haha! It's way too big for us!
wathgrithrhat.trans: 哈哈！对我们来说太大了。

dragonbodyhat.en: I'm not sure I want to be in *another* belly.
dragonbodyhat.trans: 我不确定自己是不是想在*另一个*肚子里。

moon_altar_icon.en: It wants to be back with the others.

cursed_monkey_token.en: Maybe it's a monkey friendship bracelet?
cursed_monkey_token.trans: 也许是猴子的友谊手链？

carrat_ghostracer.en: That one looks kind of spooky...

generic.en: Aww, it's too hot to climb.

mosquitofertilizer.en: It will make the little plants grow big and strong!
mosquitofertilizer.trans: 它会让小植物长得又大又壮！

mermwatchtower_noking.en: We better not get too close...

trap_teeth.trans: 这可以让我们的敌人受伤。

quagmire_key_park.en: We wanna go to the park.

tourtiere.en: We've never had meat in a pie before.
tourtiere.trans: 我们以前还没吃过饼里的肉。

trap_bramble.en: It's a very pointy planty trap!

held.en: Going on an adventure, got some fireflies in our pocket!
held.trans: 继续来一场冒险吧，我们已经抓住一些萤火虫了！

generic.trans: 真是不容易抓住的小飞虫。

boatrace_seastack_monkey.trans: 小心！别撞到那个浮的东西！

blackflag.en: We drew a scary skull on it! But we used black ink...
blackflag.trans: 我们在上面画了一个可怕的骷髅头！但我们用的是黑色墨水……

alterguardian_contained.en: It's sucking up all the glowy stuff!
alterguardian_contained.trans: 它吸走了所有发光的东西！

roastturkey.trans: 可以把许愿骨头给我们吗？

held.en: If we eat it we'll turn to water!
held.trans: 我们如果吃掉它，会化成水的！

generic.trans: 蓝色！那是我们最喜欢的颜色！

spoiled_fish.en: It's no good to anyone now.
spoiled_fish.trans: 它现在对任何人都没有用了。

burning.en: What a senseless waste of firewood.

chopped.en: Would a cool bandage make it better, Mr. Tree?
chopped.trans: 急救绷带会有用吗，树先生？

burnt.en: Only we can prevent forest fires.
burnt.trans: 只有我们能防止森林火灾。

generic.en: Pines are always greener on the other side of the fence.
generic.trans: 围墙另一边的松树总是看起来更绿一些。

battlesong_container.en: Remember to put all the songs away when you're done!
battlesong_container.trans: 完成后，记得把所有歌曲都收起来！

animal_track.en: Whatever it is, it travels single file.
animal_track.trans: 不论是什么动物，它的足迹都是一个接着一个的。

wagboss_robot_leg.en: Luckily we have more than three legs!
wagboss_robot_leg.trans: 幸好我们不止有三条腿！

costume_blacksmith_body.en: We can wear it in the play!

flint.en: Oh, to feel a sharp edge against my skin.
flint.trans: 我感觉它的边缘好尖锐，划到我的皮肤了。

wx78module_maxhunger.en: Huh. Is that what robot insides look like?
wx78module_maxhunger.trans: 哈。机器人里面长这样啊？

oceanfish_small_9.trans: 啊哈哈，它居然会吐口水！

alterguardian_phase1_lunarrift.trans: 它看起来比之前更暴躁啦！

walterhat.en: Can we be a Pioneer too?
walterhat.trans: 我们能不能也加入先锋队？

playing.en: Watch out for the baby bird!

generic.en: It'll let us play if we give it something shiny.
generic.trans: 如果我们给它闪亮的东西，它就会让我们玩。

oceanfish_small_6.en: What if we got a pile of these and jumped in it?
oceanfish_small_6.trans: 我们弄一堆这样的鱼，然后跳进鱼堆怎么样？

oceanfish_small_7.en: Wendy got mad when we said it reminded us of her...
oceanfish_small_7.trans: 我们说它让我们想起了温蒂，因为这个她生气了……

oceanfish_small_4.en: We know we can catch a bigger fish!

wall_moonrock.en: We feel safe behind this wall... it makes us sleepy...
wall_moonrock.trans: 这堵墙让我们觉得很安全...它让我们很想睡觉...

generic.trans: 我们来玩一下乔装打扮吧！

cookedmeat.en: Can't have any pudding if we don't eat it.
cookedmeat.trans: 如果不吃肉，就没有布丁可以吃。

oceanfish_small_3.en: It's kind of cute. Too bad we're gonna eat it.
oceanfish_small_3.trans: 有点可爱。可惜会被我们吃掉。

firestarter.en: We don't think you were supposed to start that fire.
firestarter.trans: 我们觉得你不该放那把火。

ghost.en: Oh no, %s is hurt!
ghost.trans: 哦不，%s受伤了！

murderer.en: We thought you were nice!
murderer.trans: 我们还以为你很善良呢！

attacker.en: %s, don't you think you should say sorry?

reviver.en: Thanks a bunch, %s!

generic.en: Hey %s! Do you have any snacks?
It looks like a nice bird.

poweroff.en: Maybe it used to go somewhere?
poweroff.trans: 也许以前它能去别的地方？

generic.en: Aw, this one didn't turn back on.

carrot_planted.trans: 我要把你的头埋在土里，胡萝卜。

firestarter.en: Stop it, %s! You're gonna get in trouble!

ghost.en: Uh oh, %s needs help!
ghost.trans: 啊噢，%s需要帮助！

murderer.en: We never wanna see you again, not after what you did!
murderer.trans: 在你做了那事之后，我们再也不想见到你了！

reviver.en: Thanks %s! We hope it didn't take up too much of your time...
reviver.trans: 多谢，%s！希望没有太占用你的时间……

generic.en: Hey %s! Have you been any-when interesting lately?
generic.trans: 嘿，%s！你最近看到有意思的事情了吗？

carpentry_blade_moonglass.en: Ms. Wickerbottom said we should be extra careful with that.
carpentry_blade_moonglass.trans: 薇克巴顿女士说我们对此应该格外小心。

boat_bumper_kelp.en: It keeps the boat from getting hurt.

ghostlyelixir_shadow.en: Hey, you didn't tell me you were making crafts!
ghostlyelixir_shadow.trans: 嘿，你没告诉我你还会做东西呢！

malbatross_beak.en: It could've eaten us in one bite!
malbatross_beak.trans: 它可以一口就吃掉我们！

deerclops.en: He might be able to digest me!

manrabbit_tail.en: We feel lucky, oh so lucky.
manrabbit_tail.trans: 我们觉得很幸运，实在是太幸运了。

merm_armory_upgraded.en: They don't seem to like sharing their toys.
merm_armory_upgraded.trans: 他们好像不太喜欢分享玩具。

houndwhistle.en: Our head buzzes when we blow it.
houndwhistle.trans: 我们吹这个时候脑袋嗡嗡响。

beefalotreat.trans: 皮弗娄牛听话就会得到奖励。

burning.en: I miss the puppy, but I don't want it to come back.
burning.trans: 我想念小狗，但不想让它回来。

reviving.en: Make it stop, make it stop!

uncommon.en: We're going to collect all of them!

rare.en: Oooh, we got an extra special one!
rare.trans: 哦，我们拿到了一个特别特别的！

carnival_prizebooth_kit.en: We can't wait to see what kind of prizes they have!
carnival_prizebooth_kit.trans: 我们迫不及待地想看看他们有什么样的奖品！

alterguardianhat.en: We see things when we put it on...
alterguardianhat.trans: 我们戴上它以后能看到些东西……

generic.en: We can make some fun stuff now!
generic.trans: 我们现在可以做一些有趣的东西了！

empty.en: We should find some meat for it.
empty.trans: 我们应该为它找一些肉。

quagmire_mealingstone.en: We want to do the grinding!

marbleshrub.en: That's a weird shape for a bush.
marbleshrub.trans: 那形状对灌木来说很奇怪。

cannonball_rock_item.en: Mr. Wolfgang says to lift with your legs, and we've got lots!
cannonball_rock_item.trans: 沃尔夫冈先生说举重主要靠腿，我们有很多腿呢！

winter_ornament.en: Can we get a boost? We can't reach the treetop.
winter_ornament.trans: 可以推我们一把吗？我们爬不上树的顶部。

butterflymuffin.en: Do you know the muffin spider?
butterflymuffin.trans: 你认识会做松饼的蜘蛛吗？

saddle_war.en: We'll have lots of fun riding on this.

perogies.en: It does not look like pie...

dumbbell_gem.en: It looks so easy when Mr. Wolfgang does it...
dumbbell_gem.trans: 沃尔夫冈先生做的时候看起来很容易……

spidergland.en: I won't think about where it came from.
spidergland.trans: 我想不出来它来自哪里。

turf_marsh.en: Some ground that we dug up.

wagpunk_workstation.trans: 我们能造些好玩的东西吗？

yotb.en: We should show it to the judge!
yotb.trans: 我们应该把它给评委看！

record_dawn.en: It makes us want to do a little dance!
record_dawn.trans: 这让我们想跳一支小舞！

generic.en: It looks scary, but that doesn't mean it's bad!
generic.trans: 它看起来很吓人，但并不意味着它坏！

ghost.en: Don't worry! Our spider friends will help bring you back!
ghost.trans: 别担心！蜘蛛朋友会把你带回来！

firestarter.en: Uhh, uh-oh, let's play a different game, %s.
firestarter.trans: 唔，唔哦，玩个不一样的游戏吧，%s。

murderer.en: We're taking my friendship bracelet back!
murderer.trans: 我们要把我的友谊手链拿回来！

reviver.en: %s always plays nice with ghosts.

slingshotammo_marble.en: Do you want us to help clean up?

asparagus_oversized.en: Oh... that's a lot of asparagus...

mandrake_planted.trans: 这种植物的外形真有趣。

spear.en: We should stick things with the pointy part.
spear.trans: 我们应该用尖的那端去刺敌人。

generic.en: "The wheel on the gym goes round and round."

cookbook.en: Now we'll never forget a recipe!
cookbook.trans: 这下我们不会再忘记菜谱了！

redgem.en: It feels warm, even on the coldest nights.
redgem.trans: 即使在最冷的夜晚，它也令人感觉很温暖。

empty.en: There aren't any mushrooms.

mermguard_shadow.en: We've been starting to get a little worried about Wurt...
mermguard_shadow.trans: 我们开始有点担心沃特了……

slingshotammo_freeze.en: Do you want us to help clean up?

generic.en: At least he won't try to stomp on us anymore.
generic.trans: 起码他不会再踩我们了。

wagstaff_npc.en: Should we help him? I don't mind, but he's not so sure...
wagstaff_npc.trans: 我们应该帮他吗？我不介意，可是他看起来不是很确定……

armor_bramble.en: We're ready to let spikes fly!
armor_bramble.trans: 准备好了，让尖刺飞起来吧！

boat_ancient_item.en: Building a new boat to look old? We don't get it...
boat_ancient_item.trans: 造一艘看起来像旧船的新船吗？我们不明白...

dumbbell_marble.en: It looks so easy when Mr. Wolfgang does it...
dumbbell_marble.trans: 沃尔夫冈先生做的时候看起来很容易……

minerhat.en: A handy light for our head.
minerhat.trans: 戴在头上的便利照明工具。

leafymeatburger.en: This hamburger tastes kind of... grassy?
leafymeatburger.trans: 这个汉堡包吃起来有点……草味？

book_elemental.en: Are those even words in there?

latkes.en: They're like pancakes made out of potatoes!
latkes.trans: 它们就像是土豆做的煎饼！

active.en: I hope no one gets a headache.

chesspiece_guardianphase3.en: It can't still see us... right?
chesspiece_guardianphase3.trans: 这下它看不到我们了……对吧？

quagmire_park_angel.en: I think it's sort of pretty.

fish_cooked.trans: 片片分明、鲜嫩多汁。真是太美味了。

boatfragment03.en: Oh no, someone had an accident!

healingstaff.en: That uses magic to hurt people.

goggleshat.en: We wish it had eight lenses.
goggleshat.trans: 我们希望它有八层镜片。

coontail.en: I always liked pulling Whiskers' tail.
coontail.trans: 我总是喜欢去扯猫的尾巴。

boatfragment05.en: Oh no, someone had an accident!

boatfragment04.en: Oh no, someone had an accident!

growing.en: I wonder what the bees are making!
growing.trans: 我好奇蜜蜂们在做什么！

generic.en: Not web. We can't walk on it.
generic.trans: 不是网。我们不能在上面走！

carnivalgame_shooting_kit.en: We can help the birds set up.
carnivalgame_shooting_kit.trans: 我们可以帮鸟儿们组装。

moonstorm_goggleshat.en: Will these goggles be able to protect all of our eyes from the storm?
moonstorm_goggleshat.trans: 这些护目镜能在风暴中保护我们的眼睛吗？

ruins_bat.en: We will, we will, smash you!

moonstorm_static_item.en: It's like a big lightning bug stuck in a jar.
moonstorm_static_item.trans: 它就像是被困在罐子里的一只大闪电虫。

charlie_lecturn.en: Maybe we can play one of the characters!
charlie_lecturn.trans: 也许我们可以扮演其中一个角色！

male_puppet.en: He doesn't look like he's having much fun.

atrium_overgrowth.trans: 我们从未学过这些字母。

quagmire_salt_rack_item.en: We should set it up at the crusty pond.
quagmire_salt_rack_item.trans: 我们应该把它安装在盐池边。

miniflare.en: Just in case someone's lost and lonely.
miniflare.trans: 为迷路的人和孤独的人准备的。

spiderqueen.trans: 会生出小蜘蛛的长腿母蜘蛛？

tacklestation.en: Father used to take me fishing sometimes.
tacklestation.trans: 爸爸以前会带我去钓鱼。

withered.en: It's all dried out and dead.

quagmire_pot_hanger_item.trans: 我们应该把它组装起来。

hammer_mjolnir.en: We're not strong enough to use it.
hammer_mjolnir.trans: 我们不够强壮，用不了它。

raincoat.en: Dry fur is the best fur.

inert.en: Someone forgot to decorate their sandcastle.
inert.trans: 有人忘记装点沙子城堡了。

starving.trans: 我想它应该是饿得快不行了！

greenmooneye.en: We could always use more eyes!
greenmooneye.trans: 我们总是能够使用更多的眼睛！

green_cap_cooked.en: Heat really brings out the juices.

krampus_sack.en: We could put more in but we're scared to touch the stuff he left inside.
krampus_sack.trans: 我们可以放更多东西进去，但我们怕触碰到他以前留在里面的东西。

held.en: If we lick it we'll turn to wood!
held.trans: 我们如果舔它，会变成木头的！

generic.trans: 那是绿色，我们最喜欢的颜色！

hiding.en: Is there a spider friend rustling beneath?
hiding.trans: 下面是有一只蜘蛛朋友在沙沙作响吗？

halloweencandy_9.trans: 黏黏的虫子，美味的虫子！

robot_blueprint.en: We hope it's not too heavy for the beefalo.
robot_blueprint.trans: 希望对皮弗娄牛来说不会太重。

halloweencandy_7.en: Oh, Ms. Wicker! We saved these for you!
halloweencandy_7.trans: 哦，威克女士！我们为你留了这些东西！

mask_dollhat.en: We can pretend to be somebody else!

halloweencandy_1.en: Oh, Wendy! We'll trade you for your choco pigs!
halloweencandy_1.trans: 哦，温蒂！我们会用你去换你的巧克力猪！

generic.en: Would we change anything if we could go back in time?
generic.trans: 如果时间能倒回，我们会改变什么吗？

halloweencandy_5.en: We forgot what good things tasted like!
halloweencandy_5.trans: 我们忘记了好东西的味道！

halloweencandy_6.en: No worse than the other stuff we've eaten out here!
halloweencandy_6.trans: 不比我们在外面吃的其他东西味道差！

wx78module_music.en: Huh. Is that what robot insides look like?
wx78module_music.trans: 哈。机器人里面长这样啊？

halloweencandy_4.en: We aren't totally comfortable with this.
halloweencandy_4.trans: 这东西让我们有些不适。

salty_doghat.en: Wendy said it's her turn to play the captain.
salty_doghat.trans: 温蒂说轮到她当船长啦。

cookiecutterhat.en: We look like a hermit crab!

halloweenpotion_bravery.en: Makes us feel big and strong!

lightcrab.en: Aww don't be shy, we're friendly!
lightcrab.trans: 别害羞，我们是你的朋友！

deer_gemmed.en: Don't hurt us and we won't hurt you!
deer_gemmed.trans: 别打我们，我们也不会伤害你的！

moon_fissure_plugged.en: Woah! Why didn't we think of that?

wurt_swampitem_shadow.en: Wurt won't let us play with her mud wand, even after we shared our snacks!
wurt_swampitem_shadow.trans: 沃特不让我们玩她的泥巴棒，明明我们还跟她分享了零食！

upgraded_stacksize.en: Think of all the toys we could fit in there!
upgraded_stacksize.trans: 想想我们能把多少玩具装进去！

burnt.en: It won't be very useful to us now.
burnt.trans: 现在它对我们已经没那么大用处了。

generic.en: We could keep our toys in it!
generic.trans: 我们可以把玩具装在里面！

boat_ancient_container.en: That's where we hide all our favorite toys.
boat_ancient_container.trans: 我们最喜欢的玩具都藏在那里。

grass_umbrella.en: Rain won't keep us from playing in puddles!
grass_umbrella.trans: 雨水不会阻止我们在水坑里玩耍的！

sleep.trans: 她给我们做了一盏夜灯。

generic.trans: 她给我们做了一盏夜灯。

gestalt.en: They want to talk, but they don't know how!
gestalt.trans: 他们想交谈，但找不到方法！

lunarplant_husk.en: That was one mean plant. We're glad it's gone!
lunarplant_husk.trans: 好凶的植物。还好已经没了！

critter_lunarmothling.en: A spider and an insect, what a pair!

bonestew.trans: 闻起来像星期天的晚餐。

yotb_stage_item.en: We need to find a good spot for the contest.
yotb_stage_item.trans: 我们得为比赛选个好地方。

phonograph.en: We could listen to that forever.

halloween_ornament_1.trans: 噢。怕怕。我们应该装饰一下！

halloween_ornament_3.en: Aw. It's not real. Let's hang it somewhere.
halloween_ornament_3.trans: 哎，不是真的。我们把它挂起来吧。

halloween_ornament_4.en: Let's hang it somewhere for Halloween!
halloween_ornament_4.trans: 我们把它挂起来当万圣节装饰吧！

rat.en: They're getting the hang of it!

generic.en: We're gonna be the very best trainer!

lunarthrall_plant.trans: 那颗植物看起来有点吓人……

halloween_ornament_5.en: We should put this guy in a tree!
halloween_ornament_5.trans: 我们应该把这个家伙放到树上！

halloween_ornament_6.en: If we put it in a tree it'd look almost real.
halloween_ornament_6.trans: 如果把它放到树上，看上去就会很逼真。

costume_princess_body.trans: 一定是用来参加派对的！

empty.en: The pot's empty.

webber_spider_minion.en: We'll protect each other, spider babies!
webber_spider_minion.trans: 我们互相保护吧，蜘蛛宝宝们！

nightmaregrowth.en: Um... we don't think the ground was like that before.
nightmaregrowth.trans: 呃……地面之前好像不是那样的。

cutreeds.trans: 芦苇、蜘蛛网，有什么区别。

yotc_carrat_gym_speed_item.en: This should help make our Carrat faster!
yotc_carrat_gym_speed_item.trans: 这个应该能让我们的胡萝卜鼠跑的快一点！

generic.en: We need to be ready for anything.
generic.trans: 我们要做好应对一切的准备。

quagmire_swampig_house.en: I've never seen their houses up close!
quagmire_swampig_house.trans: 我从来没这么近距离看过它们的房子！

book_moon.en: We try not to think about the moon too much...
book_moon.trans: 我们尽量不去想月亮的事……

shadowdigger.trans: 有时可怕的东西并不坏。

goatmilk.en: A glass of milk with every supper.

lunarplanthat.en: We're gonna be a spider knight!

stuffedeggplant.en: We will stuff ourself with eggyplants!
stuffedeggplant.trans: 我们要用茄子塞满我们的肚子！

turfcraftingstation.en: We always liked playing with dirt! Just remember to wash up before dinner.
turfcraftingstation.trans: 我们喜欢玩泥土！只要吃饭前洗干净就可以了。

active.en: We could use this to visit new worlds!
active.trans: 我们可以用这个来探索新世界！

partial.en: I don't think we're done yet!
partial.trans: 我觉得我们还没有完成！

generic.en: I can hear the sounds of another world!
generic.trans: 我可以听到另一个世界的声音！

chesspiece_toadstool.en: Now we can play leap frog with it!
chesspiece_toadstool.trans: 现在我们可以和它一起玩跳跳蛙了！

hivehat.en: We could be part bee now too!
hivehat.trans: 我们现在也可以成为蜜蜂的一份子了！

tallbirdegg.trans: 我刚才听到的是唧唧声吗？

armorwood.trans: 想跟我的木甲打一架吗？

shadow_forge.en: We'd rather do crafts with paper and glue...
shadow_forge.trans: 我们更愿意用纸和胶水做手工……

chesspiece_kitcoon.en: Woah! We hope they don't fall over...

quagmire_crabmeat_cooked.en: We don't want to eat it.

chesspiece_bearger.trans: 这些皮毛看起来真逼真！

ancient_husk.en: Were they mad at each other?
ancient_husk.trans: 他们当时在生彼此的气吗？

scraphat.en: It still smells like pig sweat!

unwritten.trans: 哦哦喔！我们该说些什么呢？

generic.en: We could write on that if only we had a pen!
generic.trans: 要是有支笔，我们就可以在上面写点什么了！

ghost.en: You're looking much paler than usual, %s!
ghost.trans: 你比平常看起来更苍白，%s！

firestarter.en: Uh... Is your hair smoking, %s?

murderer.en: Meanie! We will stop you no matter what!
murderer.trans: 小气鬼！我们无论如何也会阻止你的！

attacker.en: Why are you being so mean, %s?

reviver.en: %s doesn't believe in ghosts, but he believes in us!

quagmire_goatmilk.en: Milk is good for our bones. Endo and exo!
quagmire_goatmilk.trans: 牛奶对我们的骨骼有益。内型-外型异构！

quagmire_wheat_seeds.en: We can find out what they are by planting them.
quagmire_wheat_seeds.trans: 种下它们，我们就会知道它们到底是什么。

remains_eye_bone.en: The eyebone didn't survive the trip.
remains_eye_bone.trans: 眼骨在传送中变成了灰烬。

remains_glommerflower.trans: 我可怜的花没能撑过去。

remains_thingie.en: Whatever it was, it's gone back to the earth.
remains_thingie.trans: 无论什么东西，最终都会回归大地。

generic.en: There's all kinds of fun things you can do at sea.
generic.trans: 在海上可以做各种好玩的事情。

leafymeatsouffle.en: We're not sure about this one...

firepen.en: How dangerous could a pen really be?

moon_altar_seed.en: It wants to go to one of those cracks in the ground.

generic.en: Aww, it won't work on us.

quagmire_rubble_pubdoor.trans: 它再也不能通往任何地方了。

durian_seeds.en: We could grow something with these.
durian_seeds.trans: 我们可以用这些种子种点东西出来。

beardhair.en: In another life, I could've grown this.
beardhair.trans: 换种活法的话，我本来可以长出胡子的。

seastack.en: We hope no one crashes their boat on that!
seastack.trans: 希望谁的船都别撞上了！

pomegranate_seeds.en: We could grow something with these.
pomegranate_seeds.trans: 我们可以用这些种子种点东西出来。

cookedmonstermeat.en: I don't know what everyone's complaining about.
cookedmonstermeat.trans: 我不知道每个人在抱怨什么。

type3.en: I broke mother's vase once... she wasn't happy.
type3.trans: 我有一次打碎了妈妈的花瓶...她当时生气了。

type2.en: It looks real lifelike, but it's all cold to touch.
type2.trans: 它看起来真是栩栩如生，但是太冷了，没法碰。

carnival_host.en: That's the biggest crow we've ever seen!
carnival_host.trans: 那是我们见过最大的乌鸦！

eyeofterror_mini.en: We're not usually so bothered by a few extra eyes.
eyeofterror_mini.trans: 通常来说多几个眼睛我们也无所谓。

ghostlyelixir_revive.en: Hey, you didn't tell us you were making crafts!
ghostlyelixir_revive.trans: 嘿，你没告诉我你还会做东西呢！

critter_glomling.trans: 他给了我们毛茸茸的拥抱。

saltbox.trans: 能让我们的食物放久一点。

tentacle.en: We would be mad if something stepped on us, too.
tentacle.trans: 如果有东西踩到我们，我们也会发狂的。

has_item.en: I remember drawing at the table.
has_item.trans: 想起了以前在桌子上画画的时候。

generic.en: I remember drawing at the table.
generic.trans: 想起了以前在桌子上画画的时候。

walkingplank.en: It's the least fun diving board.

fishtacos.trans: 星期二是鱼肉玉米卷日！

merm_tool_upgraded.en: Wow, it does everything! Sort of.
merm_tool_upgraded.trans: 哇，它什么都能做！大概是。

held.en: We all want a bit of freedom.

generic.en: Oh, you look like you're having a grand time, flying about.
generic.trans: 噢，你飞来飞去，看起来日子过得不错。

treasurechest_trap.en: It couldn't hurt to take a peek inside...
treasurechest_trap.trans: 偷偷看一眼应该没事吧...

winter_ornamentforge.en: Not so scary when they're like this.
winter_ornamentforge.trans: 它们这个样子没那么可怕。

oceanfishingbobber_canary.en: We turned a feather into a float!
oceanfishingbobber_canary.trans: 我们把羽毛变成了浮漂！

cane.en: One more point of contact couldn't slow us down.
cane.trans: 再多一条腿也不会拖慢我们的速度。

diseased.en: Maybe it needs some chicken soup?

generic.trans: 那些浆果看起来好多汁！

wormlight_lesser.en: I dare you to eat it!

empty.en: We can make mud pies!

pepper_seeds.en: Let's plant these and see what grows.
pepper_seeds.trans: 我们来播种，然后等待收获。

yotb.en: We should show it to the judge!
yotb.trans: 我们应该把它给评委看！

maxwelllight.en: Well, these would've been handy before.
maxwelllight.trans: 呃，这些以前本来是很便利的。

voidclothhat.en: It makes us look pretty spooky.
voidclothhat.trans: 它让我们看起来很吓人。

bird_mutant.en: We think there might be something wrong with that bird...
bird_mutant.trans: 我们觉得那只鸟有点不对劲……

opalstaff.en: Whew. Gotta be careful where you point it!
opalstaff.trans: 哟。在你指它的地方小心点！

carnivalfood_corntea.en: Is Ms. Wickerbottom trying to trick us into eating our vegetables again?
carnivalfood_corntea.trans: 薇克巴顿女士又想哄我们吃蔬菜吗？

orangegem.en: Orange you glad we found you, gem?
orangegem.trans: 找到你了，橙宝石，你很开心吧？

orangemooneye.en: This rock helps me find my friends!
orangemooneye.trans: 这块岩石帮我找到了我的朋友！

lobsterdinner.en: We have to eat it with our eyes closed. Too many legs!
lobsterdinner.trans: 我们不忍心看着把它吃下去。太多条腿了！

pumpkin_oversized.en: Let's carve a big scary face into it!
pumpkin_oversized.trans: 让我们在上面刻一张恐怖的大脸吧！

generic.en: We could sculpt a stallion battalion!
generic.trans: 我们可以雕刻出一支千里马部队！

shadowthrall_hands.en: We wonder if they get dizzy walking like that...
shadowthrall_hands.trans: 我们想知道他们这样走路会不会头晕……

lunarrift_portal.en: Aww, it won't let us in.

slingshotmodkit.trans: 沃尔特的玩具是最好玩的。

turf_ruinstiles_glow.en: It looks old, but it's not really.
turf_ruinstiles_glow.trans: 虽然看起来旧，但不是真的旧。

low.en: The fire's getting a touch low.

embers.en: We should put something on the fire before it goes out.
embers.trans: 我们应该在熄火前加点东西进去。

generic.en: Sure beats the cold. And darkness.
generic.trans: 这样就可以赶走寒冷，还有黑暗。

out.en: Well, that's done. But not forever!
out.trans: 得，火熄了。但只是暂时的！

koalefig_trunk.trans: 那个看起来特别填肚子！

low.en: The fire's getting a touch low.

embers.en: We should put something on the fire before it goes out.
embers.trans: 我们应该在熄火前加点东西进去。

generic.en: Sure beats the heat. And darkness.
generic.trans: 这样就可以赶走炎热，还有黑暗。

generic.en: Like a pillow fort, but wood!
generic.trans: 像一座枕头城堡，不过是木头做的！

burnt.en: Turns out wood burns really well.
burnt.trans: 木头果然是最容易烧着的东西。

glasscutter.en: It's sharp enough to split a spider hair.
glasscutter.trans: 锋利，能切断蜘蛛的绒毛。

balanced.trans: 我们认为它已经准备好了！

generic.en: Let's make food for the plants!
generic.trans: 让我们为植物制作食物吧！

turf_sandy.en: Some ground that we dug up.

boat_bumper_crabking_kit.en: Now we can play bumper boats!
boat_bumper_crabking_kit.trans: 现在我们可以玩碰碰船了!

lit.en: We like to imagine the little lamb is smiling at us!
lit.trans: 想象小咩咩正在对我们微笑！

generic.en: We should make a little fire.

lit.en: Maybe we should try to fix it up.
lit.trans: 也许我们应该尝试修复它。

generic.en: We should make a little fire.

quagmire_goatmum.en: Does your kid want to play?

lit.en: It shines so bright, it almost hurts our eyes.
lit.trans: 它如此耀眼，几乎刺痛了我们的眼睛。

generic.en: We should make a little fire.

lavaarena_armormediumdamager.en: We like this armor a lot.
lavaarena_armormediumdamager.trans: 我们非常喜欢这副盔甲。

chester.en: Haha. You make all our stuff slobbery.
chester.trans: 哈哈。你让我们的所有东西都湿乎乎的。

dumbbell.en: It looks so easy when Mr. Wolfgang does it...
dumbbell.trans: 沃尔夫冈先生做的时候看起来很容易……

charging.en: We don't think it would work very well in the rain.
charging.trans: 我们觉得它应该不能在雨里用。

charged.en: We don't think it would work very well in the rain.
charged.trans: 我们觉得它应该不能在雨里用。

generic.en: We don't think it would work very well in the rain.
generic.trans: 我们觉得它应该不能在雨里用。

off.en: Hey Winona! How do we fix it?
off.trans: 嗨，薇诺娜！我们怎么修好它呢？

grotto_pool_small.en: Isn't it dangerous to have glass in the pool?
grotto_pool_small.trans: 游泳池里放玻璃，不是很危险吗？

generic.en: Now we wait for our present!
generic.trans: 现在就等给我们送礼物啦！

empty.en: We have to give it something first!

wall_stone_2.trans: 向建造营地的大师鞠躬！

mutator_spitter.en: We made it look just like our friend!
mutator_spitter.trans: 我们把它做得就像我们的朋友一样！

iceberg_melted.en: We guess it's too hot out.

lureplantbulb.en: I wish we could learn to generate meat.
lureplantbulb.trans: 真希望我们能够学会如何生产肉。

on.en: This would come in handy in a snowball fight.
on.trans: 这个在雪球大战中派得上用场。

barnaclepita.en: It's a little pocket of chewiness!
barnaclepita.trans: 一个很有嚼劲的小口袋！

boatpatch.en: It makes the boat feel better.

wx78module_maxsanity.en: Huh. Is that what robot insides look like?
wx78module_maxsanity.trans: 哈。机器人里面长这样啊？

quagmire_portal.en: At least it took us somewhere different.
quagmire_portal.trans: 至少它把我们带到了不一样的地方。

generic.en: So big it could fit everyone!

quagmire_grill_item.en: We could use it to make yummy food.
quagmire_grill_item.trans: 我们可以用它做出美味的食物。

voidcloth_scythe.en: He never used anything like this back on the farm.
voidcloth_scythe.trans: 他原先在农场时从来没用过这样的东西。

spring.en: I hope they're okay in there.
spring.trans: 希望它们待在里面没事。

generic.en: Come out! We just want to be friends.
generic.trans: 出来吧！我们只是想和你做朋友。

firestarter.en: You were just supposed to mime lighting it!
firestarter.trans: 你刚才应该模仿点着它！

ghost.en: We'll help you get back on your feet, %s!
ghost.trans: 我们帮你从头再来，%s！

murderer.en: You're supposed to play nice!
murderer.trans: 你应该打得不错！

attacker.en: Maybe we can talk this out?
attacker.trans: 可能我们可以公开谈这个？

reviver.en: %s is super nice. And his makeup's cool!

ready.en: Hey Ms. Old Lady! Look at all the honey they made!
ready.trans: 嘿，老夫人！瞧它们酿了多少蜂蜜！

fullhoney.en: Hey Ms. Old Lady! Look at all the honey they made!
fullhoney.trans: 嘿，老夫人！瞧它们酿了多少蜂蜜！

generic.en: We hear a lot of buzzing inside...
generic.trans: 我们听到里面嗡嗡的叫……

burnt.en: The site of The Great Honey Fire.
burnt.trans: 我的蜂蜜就这样烧没了。

cabbagerolls.en: We hope Ms. Wickerbottom doesn't find out we didn't eat the cabbage...
cabbagerolls.trans: 希望薇克巴顿女士别发现我们没吃白菜……

generic.en: Woah! We should find a big fish to put in there!
generic.trans: 哇！我们去抓条大鱼放进去！

fence_electric_item.trans: 我们应该把它放在哪呢？

leif_sparse.trans: 那东西是从哪儿冒出来的？！

lobsterbisque.en: We want to pour it all over our tongues!
lobsterbisque.trans: 我们恨不得把它放在舌头上！

yotr_food4.en: We can eat one puff, and share the rest with our friends!
yotr_food4.trans: 我们可以吃一个，然后跟朋友分享一个。

bugnet.en: I'm not a bug! We're an arachnid!
bugnet.trans: 我不是只虫子！我们是蛛形纲生物！

yotr_food3.en: We kinda want to poke it.

yotr_food1.en: It looks like cake, but it smells like veggies...
yotr_food1.trans: 看起来像是蛋糕，可是闻起来像蔬菜……

lavaarena_armorlightspeed.en: We'd skitter really fast with that.
lavaarena_armorlightspeed.trans: 我们穿着那个可以行走如飞。

slingshotammo_slow.en: Do you want us to help clean up?

broken_forgeditem.en: Oh no! Maybe we can fix it?
broken_forgeditem.trans: 不好！也许我们可以修复它？

book_rain.en: "One of the simplest ways to invite rain is to kill a-" oh...
book_rain.trans: “最简单的求雨方法之一就是杀死一只——”噢……

waiting.trans: 发现一只相当疲惫的眼睛。

fruitflyfruit.en: Now the Fruit Flies listen to us!
fruitflyfruit.trans: 现在果蝇都听我们的话！

merm_prince.en: Wow, becoming a king looks easy!
merm_prince.trans: 哇，登基当皇帝看起来好容易！

lucy.en: If we talk to it will it talk back?
lucy.trans: 我们和它聊天，它会回话吗？

whip.en: Oooh, it makes so much noise!
whip.trans: 噢，它制造了这么多的噪音！

walkingplank_grass.en: It's the least fun diving board.

desiccant.en: It keeps our fur from getting too wet.
desiccant.trans: 这样我们的绒毛就不会被打得太湿。

gems.en: It needs something to focus the power.
gems.trans: 需要有东西来聚集能量。

ghostflower.en: This seems like something Wendy would like.
ghostflower.trans: 这个看起来像是温蒂会喜欢的东西。

ghost.en: Don't worry Ms. %s, we'll find you a heart!
ghost.trans: 别担心，%s 女士，我们会帮你找一个心脏的！

firestarter.en: Ms. %s! We already had our combustion lessons!
firestarter.trans: %s女士！我们已经上过燃烧课了！

murderer.en: Killer! Does this mean we don't have to do our homework?!
murderer.trans: 杀手！所以我们不用写作业了？

attacker.en: Uh-oh! We're in trouble with Ms. %s!
attacker.trans: 哦喔！我们与%s女士有麻烦了！

reviver.en: Ms. %s is very smart and wise. She's neat!
reviver.trans: %s女士非常聪明睿智。她干净整洁！

waterplant_bomb.en: We're sorry! We didn't mean it!
waterplant_bomb.trans: 我们很抱歉！我们不是故意的！

quagmire_fern.en: Maybe we could make a salad.
quagmire_fern.trans: 也许我们可以做个沙拉。

maxwellthrone.en: That throne makes our skin crawl.
maxwellthrone.trans: 那个王座让我们浑身起鸡皮疙瘩。

generic.trans: 冰是一种很有用的东西。

waterballoon.en: We have to be gentle with our claws if we try to hold it!

veggieomlet.en: Stop trying to trick us into eating our veggies!

mastupgrade_lamp_yotd.en: We feel a lot better having a night light around.
mastupgrade_lamp_yotd.trans: 有了小夜灯，我们感觉舒服多了。

generic.en: Would we change anything if we could go back in time?
generic.trans: 如果时间能倒回，我们会改变什么吗？

mast_malbatross_item.en: This will look great on our boat!
mast_malbatross_item.trans: 这个装在我们的小船上会很好看！

handpillow_petals.en: It's the nicest pillow we've ever smelled!
handpillow_petals.trans: 那是我们闻过最香的枕头！

scanning.en: Watch out for our webs when you're flying!
scanning.trans: 飞的时候小心我们的网！

hunting.en: Watch out for our webs when you're flying!
hunting.trans: 飞的时候小心我们的网！

generic.en: Watch out for our webs when you're flying!
generic.trans: 飞的时候小心我们的网！

open.en: I can hear some spider friends down there.
open.trans: 我可以听到下面有一些蜘蛛朋友。

generic.en: We'd rather visit our spider friends on the surface.
generic.trans: 我们宁愿拜访地面上的蜘蛛朋友。

full.en: We'll explore when everyone else has had their turn!
full.trans: 等其他人都探索以后，我们再去探索。

ghostlyelixir_attack.en: Hey, you didn't tell us you were making crafts!
ghostlyelixir_attack.trans: 嘿，你没告诉我你还会做东西呢！

nightmarepie.trans: 虽然有点吓人，但味道很好。

mutator_water.en: This one turned out really good!

rocks.en: None of these look like they would skip well.
rocks.trans: 看起来这些石头没一个能用来打水漂。

archive_moon_statue.en: Maybe the moon was important to them?
archive_moon_statue.trans: 也许他们觉得月亮很重要？

kitcoon_deciduous.en: The minister's kit is a dastardly kit!
kitcoon_deciduous.trans: 小猫猫，喵喵叫，脾气好，爱撒娇。

turf_deciduous.en: Some ground that we dug up.

peghook.en: Wouldn't you rather be bug friends with us?
peghook.trans: 你要不要成为我们的昆虫朋友？

turf_grass.en: Some ground that we dug up.

lavaarena_battlestandard.en: Hey, help me break this Battle Standard!
lavaarena_battlestandard.trans: 嘿，帮我摧毁这面战斗旗帜！

chesspiece_deerclops.en: This is a really good sculpture.

saltlick_improved.en: We know it's gross but we want to lick it anyway.
saltlick_improved.trans: 虽然我们知道这很恶心，但还是想舔一舔。

support_pillar_dreadstone_complete.en: Thanks for keeping us safe, pillar!
support_pillar_dreadstone_complete.trans: 感谢您保护我们的安全，支柱！

lots_of_flowers.en: We feel warm and fuzzy... well, more than usual.
lots_of_flowers.trans: 我们感觉比平时更加毛茸茸，更加暖和了。

lots_of_flowers_evil.en: Feels like webs in our head.
lots_of_flowers_evil.trans: 感觉脑袋里布满了蛛网。

some_flowers.trans: 我们能找到更多的花朵！

generic.trans: 是阿比盖尔的一个小房子！

dock_kit.en: We've decided we're going to be a dock spider now.
dock_kit.trans: 我们已经决定，我们现在要做一只码头蜘蛛。

durian_cooked.en: No sir, I don't like it.

fig.en: This fruit is kinda weird, but tasty!
fig.trans: 这水果虽然样子怪，但是很好吃！

mast_malbatross.en: Our boat looks ready to fly away!
mast_malbatross.trans: 我们的船看起来已经可以飞走了！

quagmire_saltrock.en: We're gonna crunch them all up.

amulet.en: It's a fine necklace, I suppose.
amulet.trans: 我想这应该是条不错的项链。

diseased.en: Maybe it needs some chicken soup?

barren.en: It's run out of plant food.

sculpture_rooknose.en: Looks like a... cactus? No, that's not right.
sculpture_rooknose.trans: 看起来像是一棵...仙人掌？不，那不对。

bat.trans: 有着尖嗓门的讨厌家伙！

refined_dust.en: It's a good thing neither of us are allergic.
refined_dust.trans: 好在我们都不容易过敏。

magician_chest.en: Could we borrow it for hide-and-seek?
magician_chest.trans: 能借给我们玩捉迷藏吗？

shadowthrall_mouth.en: It's smiling at us! Maybe it wants to play!
shadowthrall_mouth.trans: 它正在对我们微笑呢！也许它想和我们玩！

buzzard.en: You won't find any carrion here. We're stuck like this.
buzzard.trans: 你在这儿找不到任何腐肉。我们会活下去的。

pepperpopper.trans: 我们吃的肚子快撑爆了！

fence_gate_item.trans: 我们来制造一个大门吧！

walkingplank_yotd.en: It's not much fun, but at least it's pretty.

orangeamulet.en: Many legs make light work, and so does this.
orangeamulet.trans: 腿越多越省事，这个东西也是一样的效果。

quagmire_wheat.en: If only I were back at the mill.
quagmire_wheat.trans: 如果我能回到磨坊就好了。

turf_meteor.en: Some ground that we dug up.

minifan.en: It cools us when we run, how nice.
minifan.trans: 我们一跑它就扇凉风，太爽了。

nutrientsgoggleshat.en: It shows us how good the dirt is, and lots of other stuff too!
nutrientsgoggleshat.trans: 能让我们看到土好不好，还有很多其他东西！

wounded.en: Aw, now it's not as pink.

tapped_bugs.en: Ew... The bugs got in it.

generic.en: I wonder why the people left this nice place.
generic.trans: 我想知道为什么人们要离开这么好的地方。

playing.en: Are the bugs the bad guys?

thulecitebugnet.en: We can make that with our beard!
thulecitebugnet.trans: 我们可以用胡须做那个！

winter_ornamentlight.en: We want to keep one for ourselves.
winter_ornamentlight.trans: 我们想要自己保留一个。

boatrace_seastack_throwable_deploykit.en: Where should we throw the floaty?
boatrace_seastack_throwable_deploykit.trans: 我们把这个浮的东西扔到哪好？

hermit_pearl.en: We'll take really good care of it!

tomato.en: Is it a fruit or a vegetable?

pickaxe_lunarplant.en: We're coming to get you, rocks!

wall_moonrock_item.en: We thought "moon" meant something totally different!
wall_moonrock_item.trans: 我们曾以为“月亮”代表着另一种完全不同的东西！

book_light_upgraded.en: It makes the brightest nightlight we've ever seen!
book_light_upgraded.trans: 它是我们所见过的最亮的夜灯！

spider_whistle.en: We can call our spider friends!
spider_whistle.trans: 我们可以呼叫蜘蛛朋友了！

oceanfishinglure_hermit_heavy.en: We're gonna catch the biggest fish with this!
oceanfishinglure_hermit_heavy.trans: 我们会用这个抓到最大的鱼！

generic.en: It wants to give us presents!

empty.en: Let's put the torch in!

crimson.en: Uh oh... is the tree sick?

waiting_for_dark.en: We could give it just a little shake, couldn't we?
waiting_for_dark.trans: 我们能不能轻轻摇一摇？

cooldown.en: Oh no! Did we lose the little tree somewhere?
cooldown.trans: 哦，不！我们是不是把小树丢在哪里了？

spawn_disabled.en: We think we're done playing with Mr. Eyeball.
spawn_disabled.trans: 我们认为我们已经和眼球先生玩够了。

generic.en: So pretty! We want to shake it!
generic.trans: 太漂亮了！我们想摇摇它！

enabled.en: WE DIDN'T SHAKE IT, WE PROMISE!!
enabled.trans: 我们没有摇动它，我们保证！！

lavaarena_lightdamagerhat.en: That looks like it was made for spiders.
lavaarena_lightdamagerhat.trans: 它像是针对蜘蛛而做的。

icehound.en: He has a chilling look in his eyes.

locked.en: It's locked. I think we need a key.
locked.trans: 它是锁着的。我认为我们需要一把钥匙。

sleeping.en: Aww! I think it's having a dream.

generic.en: Where's the king of the castle?

woby_treat.en: One for Woby, one for us!
woby_treat.trans: 一个给沃比，一个给我们！

record_worktobedone.en: It makes us want to do a little dance!
record_worktobedone.trans: 这让我们想跳一支小舞！

potatosack.en: We peeked inside, some of them looked more like rocks than potatoes...
potatosack.trans: 我们偷看过了，里面的有些东西看起来更像石头而不是土豆。

burning.en: What a senseless waste of firewood.

poison.trans: 什么事情让你这么火大？

chopped.en: Would a cool bandage make it better, Mr. Tree?
chopped.trans: 急救绷带会有用吗，树先生？

generic.en: My, what nice foliage you have.
generic.trans: 天啊，你的叶子长得真茂盛。

burnt.en: Only we can prevent forest fires.
burnt.trans: 只有我们能防止森林火灾。

wagstaff_item_2.trans: 这是真的吗？我们有点蒙了。

bedroll_straw.trans: 虽然有股霉臭味儿，但还算舒服。

oceanfishingbobber_malbatross.en: We made this float extra fancy.
oceanfishingbobber_malbatross.trans: 我们把这个浮漂做的特别漂亮。

figatoni.en: We've never had sweet pasta before!
figatoni.trans: 我们从来没吃过甜的意大利面！

book_light.en: Ms. Wickerbottom, could you make a nightlight for us?
book_light.trans: 薇克巴顿女士，你能帮我们做一盏夜灯吗？

lost_toy_42.en: We think those might belong to someone else.
lost_toy_42.trans: 我们觉得这些应该是其他人的。

lost_toy_43.en: We think those might belong to someone else.
lost_toy_43.trans: 我们觉得这些应该是其他人的。

armor_voidcloth.en: It makes it look like our tummy's smiling!
armor_voidcloth.trans: 它让我们的肚子看起来像在微笑！

marble.en: Maybe we should take up sculpting.
marble.trans: 也许我们该练练雕刻了。

waterpump.en: Hey... is that a fish inside?

support_pillar.en: Uh oh, those cracks are looking bigger...
support_pillar.trans: 呃，那些裂缝看起来变得更大了……

dirtpile.en: A pile of dirt. I bet it's hiding something.
dirtpile.trans: 一堆泥土。泥土下面肯定藏着什么东西。

justeggs.trans: 给我们换煎饼吃好不好？

antler.en: Did you change your hair? Looks good!
antler.trans: 你是不是改变了你的发型？看起来不错！

flower_evil.en: This flower is decidedly not nice!
flower_evil.trans: 这种花肯定不是什么好东西！

mask_foolhat.en: We can pretend to be somebody else!

empty.en: Aw, there's nothing in there.

lost_toy_10.en: We think those might belong to someone else.
lost_toy_10.trans: 我们觉得这些应该是其他人的。

lost_toy_11.en: We think those might belong to someone else.
lost_toy_11.trans: 我们觉得这些应该是其他人的。

lost_toy_14.en: We think those might belong to someone else.
lost_toy_14.trans: 我们觉得这些应该是其他人的。

burnt.en: That's probably why I wasn't allowed in father's study.
burnt.trans: 那可能就是我为什么被禁止进入父亲的书房的原因。

generic.en: Heh heh. I was never allowed in father's study.
generic.trans: 嘿嘿。我从来没有被允许进入父亲的书房过。

durian_oversized.en: Eww... it has a bigger stink too.

stale.en: Is it going bad? Is that good?

spoiled.en: It's gotten really rotten looking... yay!
spoiled.trans: 它看起来已经非常腐烂了……耶！

generic.en: Wendy dared us to drink it...

support_pillar_dreadstone.en: Uh oh, those cracks are looking bigger...
support_pillar_dreadstone.trans: 呃，那些裂缝看起来变得更大了……

has_loot.trans: 我们看到里面有好吃的！

inground.en: I think it needs help getting out.
inground.trans: 我认为它需要有人帮它出来。

empty.en: Do you think we'd fit?

bernie_big.en: It's creepy and cute at the same time!!

wx78_scanner_succeeded.en: WX! We think Jimmy's trying to get your attention!

garlic_seeds.en: We can find out what they are by planting them.
garlic_seeds.trans: 种下它们，我们就会知道它们到底是什么。

hermit_bundle_shells.en: We have so many shells to play with!
hermit_bundle_shells.trans: 我们有好多的贝壳可以玩！

burnt.en: Aww. Can we make another one?
burnt.trans: 哦。我们可以再制造一个吗？

empty.en: I always wanted pottery lessons!

lost_toy_18.en: We think those might belong to someone else.
lost_toy_18.trans: 我们觉得这些应该是其他人的。

lost_toy_19.en: We think those might belong to someone else.
lost_toy_19.trans: 我们觉得这些应该是其他人的。

bloom.en: It's all round and squishy now!
bloom.trans: 它现在圆滚滚、软绵绵的！

walrus.en: I don't think he wants to be friends with us.
walrus.trans: 他应该不想和我们交朋友吧。

elixir_container.en: Will Abigail mind if we try some?
elixir_container.trans: 我们试吃一下阿比盖尔会介意吗？

mandrakesoup.en: We fall asleep in the bath too!
mandrakesoup.trans: 我们也会在浴缸里睡着！

generic.trans: 我们快开始枕头大战吧！

lutefisk.en: It looks weird... but tastes great!
lutefisk.trans: 看起来奇怪……但是很好吃！

turf_mosaic_grey.en: Some ground that we dug up.

quagmire_plate_silver.en: Now we don't have to eat off the floor.
quagmire_plate_silver.trans: 现在我们不用在地上吃饭了。

monkeyisland_portal_debris.trans: 那个金属的东西是什么？

jellybean.en: Will they grow into candy beanstalks?
jellybean.trans: 它们会长成糖果豆茎吗？

wx78module_taser.en: Huh. Is that what robot insides look like?
wx78module_taser.trans: 哈。机器人里面长这样啊？

watermelonicle.en: Just the thing for a hot summer day.
watermelonicle.trans: 只属于炎炎夏日的东西。

miasma.trans: 它让我们感觉生病了一样。

yotb.en: We should show it to the judge!
yotb.trans: 我们应该把它给评委看！

charlie_hand.trans: 我们觉得它有想要的东西！

generic.en: Winona wouldn't let us play with them. We've never seen her so stern...
generic.trans: 薇诺娜不让我们玩眼镜。我们还没见过她这么严厉……

wagpunk_cagewall.en: Now we can't cross the line?
wagpunk_cagewall.trans: 现在我们不能越界了吗？

saddle_wathgrithr.en: Wigfrid takes good care of her steed.
saddle_wathgrithr.trans: 薇格弗德太会照顾她的坐骑了！

garlic_oversized.en: What do we do with all this garlic?
garlic_oversized.trans: 这么多大蒜要怎么处理？

generic.en: Just like grandpa said, "You live in what you eat."
generic.trans: 就像爷爷说过的：“你住在你吃的东西里。”

burnt.trans: 这个胡萝卜太大了点，而且烧过头了。

buried.en: Oh. That's why we don't play in the big junk pile.
buried.trans: 喔。那就是为什么我们不在大垃圾堆里玩耍。

generic.en: Does he want to play with us?

oceanfishingbobber_goose.en: We made this float extra fancy.
oceanfishingbobber_goose.trans: 我们把这个浮漂做的特别漂亮。

wagstaff_machinery.en: We're not supposed to play in scrap piles, no matter how much we want to.
wagstaff_machinery.trans: 不管我们有多想，我们都不能在垃圾堆里玩。

gears.en: WX eats them by the fistful!

tacklecontainer.en: It's like a toybox, but for fishing stuff!
tacklecontainer.trans: 像玩具箱一样，用来装钓鱼的东西的！

frogglebunwich.en: Sandwich for me, frog legs for him.
frogglebunwich.trans: 三明治给我，青蛙腿给他。

boat_cannon_kit.en: If we build it, can we play with it?

freshfruitcrepes.en: Cripes! We can't wait for these crepes!
freshfruitcrepes.trans: 天啊！我们等不及要吃这些薄饼了！

dustmeringue.en: It doesn't taste as good as it looks.
dustmeringue.trans: 它的味道并不像看起来那么好。

yotb.en: We should show it to the judge!
yotb.trans: 我们应该把它给评委看！

yotb.en: We should show it to the judge!
yotb.trans: 我们应该把它给评委看！

moon_altar_glass.en: It can't talk like we do, but it's a friend.
moon_altar_glass.trans: 它虽然不能像我们一样交谈，但是还是朋友。

kitcoondecor1_kit.en: We'll have it done right away!

hedgehound_bush.en: Look at all those pretty red roses.
hedgehound_bush.trans: 快看那些漂亮的红玫瑰。

hermithouse_ornament.en: Will there still be room for webs?
hermithouse_ornament.trans: 还能再留一点空间给蛛网吗？

statueharp_hedgespawner.en: This place is making our spider-hairs tingle...
statueharp_hedgespawner.trans: 这个地方让我们的蜘蛛皮发痒……

quagmire_park_obelisk.trans: 这是纪念碑或类似的什么东西。

playing_card.en: Is this the one we lost?
playing_card.trans: 这是我们丢的那张牌吗？

quagmire_portal_key.en: I wonder where this takes us.
quagmire_portal_key.trans: 我想知道它会把我们带到哪里。

ancientfruit_nightvision.en: Um... are we sure it's not full of baby spiders?
ancientfruit_nightvision.trans: 嗯……我们确定里面没有小蜘蛛吗？

ghostlyelixir_slowregen.en: Hey, you didn't tell us you were making crafts!
ghostlyelixir_slowregen.trans: 嘿，你没告诉我你还会做东西呢！

miniboatlantern.en: We like to watch it paddle around.
miniboatlantern.trans: 我们想看它划船的样子。

bundle.en: That's one of my favorite things!
bundle.trans: 那是我最喜欢的东西之一！

slingshot_band_pigskin.trans: 沃尔特的玩具是最好玩的。

orangestaff.en: Teleportation gives us a chance to rest all our feet.
orangestaff.trans: 有了瞬移，我们的这么多条腿就可以休息一下了。

pavlova.trans: 只要有糖的我们都喜欢！

firehound.en: He's got a fire under his feet. And all inside him.
firehound.trans: 他脚下有火焰，而且身体里面都是火焰。

pickledherring.en: It looks tasty but... pickled fish?
pickledherring.trans: 看起来很好吃，可……鱼真的能腌吗？

oceanfishingbobber_robin.en: We turned a feather into a float!
oceanfishingbobber_robin.trans: 我们把羽毛变成了浮漂！

generic.en: Father used to work on something like that.
generic.trans: 父亲以前总是忙活这些东西。

burnt.trans: 我们所有的努力...这下全没了。

slingshotammo_scrapfeather.en: Do you want us to help clean up?

burnt.en: The fires care not for magic.
burnt.trans: 火才不管你是不是魔法。

generic.en: We should be careful around that.
generic.trans: 在它周围的时候我们应该小心些。

generic.en: Did I just hear a squeak?
generic.trans: 我刚刚听到的是吱吱声吗？

moon_altar_crown.en: It wants to go back home.

slingshot_frame_wagpunk.trans: 沃尔特的玩具是最好玩的。

eyeofterror_mini_grounded.en: A baby eye is about to be born.

alterguardian_phase3trap.en: Now would be a really bad time to fall asleep.
alterguardian_phase3trap.trans: 现在睡着了可就完蛋了。

rabbitkinghorn.en: What kind of music do rabbits like?
rabbitkinghorn.trans: 兔子喜欢什么类型的音乐？

wolfgang_whistle.en: Mr. Wolfgang likes to play with whistles, just like us!
wolfgang_whistle.trans: 沃尔夫冈先生和我们一样喜欢吹哨子！

birdtrap.en: Come to our web trap, birds!

broken.en: Someone fix it so we can play with it.
broken.trans: 谁来修好它，我们想跟它玩。

generic.trans: 我们在玩的时候，它在工作！

turf_mosaic_red.en: Some ground that we dug up.

turf_cotl_gold.en: We can make the ground shiny!
turf_cotl_gold.trans: 我们可以让地面闪亮亮！

cutgrass.en: We should be able to weave this, too.
cutgrass.trans: 我们应该也能将它编成其他东西。

mask_ancient_architecthat.en: Do we have a smart face too?
mask_ancient_architecthat.trans: 我们有没有一样聪明的脸？

ghost.en: Don't worry! We're sure there's a heart around here somewhere!
ghost.trans: 别担心！世界这么大，我们肯定能找到颗心脏！

firestarter.en: We... don't think that's allowed...

murderer.en: Why would you do that, %s?
murderer.trans: 你为什么要这样，%s？

reviver.en: Whew, thanks %s!

mermking.trans: 他看起来像是重要人物。

lunar_grazer.en: It's trying to make us take a nap!

chesspiece_minotaur.en: We feel a bit bad for stealing their treasure.
chesspiece_minotaur.trans: 我们觉得偷了人家的宝藏有点不好。

wx78module_nightvision.en: Huh. Is that what robot insides look like?
wx78module_nightvision.trans: 哈。机器人里面长这样啊？

tumbleweed.en: Who knows what that tumbleweed has picked up.
tumbleweed.trans: 天知道那个风滚草里裹着什么。

chesspiece_muse.en: We're sure she's nicer than she looks.
chesspiece_muse.trans: 虽然看着凶，但我们觉得她人应该挺好。

purplemooneye.en: Now we won't need to leave a trail of breadcrumbs!
purplemooneye.trans: 现在我们就不需要留下一串面包碎屑了！

growing.trans: 快快长大吧，我的农作物们！

generic.en: I'll have a go at this farming thing.
generic.trans: 我要尝试一下经营农田。

burnt.en: A razed farm is no farm at all.
burnt.trans: 被烧毁的农田再也没法种东西了。

uncarved.en: It's missing eyes and a mouth.

generic.en: Aw, it's still missing some eyes.

slingshot_handle_jelly.trans: 沃尔特的玩具是最好玩的。

rock_petrified_tree.en: It's all stone and no bark.

archive_resonator_item.en: We think it's for finding something.
archive_resonator_item.trans: 我们觉得它能用来找东西。

moonbutterfly_sapling.en: It'll be a big tree one day.
moonbutterfly_sapling.trans: 有一天它会长成一棵大树。

kitcoon_marsh.en: The minister's kit is a comfy kit!
kitcoon_marsh.trans: 小猫猫，喵喵叫，脾气好，爱撒娇。

costume_king_body.en: We can wear it in the play!

generic.en: Would we change anything if we could go back in time?
generic.trans: 如果时间能倒回，我们会改变什么吗？

yotd_oar.en: We wish our claws were this big.

generic.trans: 我们可以试试吗，沃尔夫冈先生？我们有多余的手臂可以举起来！

crabking_mob.trans: 我们真的应该成为朋友。

critter_dragonling.en: She's a monster just like me!

onion.en: It makes all our eyes water!
onion.trans: 它弄得我们所有人都流眼泪了！

grotto_pool_big.en: Isn't it dangerous to have glass in the pool?
grotto_pool_big.trans: 游泳池里放玻璃，不是很危险吗？

yotr_fightring_kit.en: It's okay Ms. Wickerbottom, we'll only be fighting with pillows!
yotr_fightring_kit.trans: 放心吧，薇克巴顿女士，我们只是拿枕头打。

2.trans: 我想知道这里发生了什么事？

generic.en: We have to wait for more salt.
generic.trans: 我们必须等待更多的盐。

robot.en: Oh no, %s! %s must have really hurt them!
robot.trans: 哦不，%s！%s一定真的伤害到它了！

default.en: Oh no, %s! %s must have really hurt them!
default.trans: 哦不，%s！%s一定真的伤害到它了！

female.en: Oh no, %s! %s must have really hurt her!
female.trans: 哦不，%s！%s一定真的伤害到她了！

male.en: Oh no, %s! %s must have really hurt him!
male.trans: 哦不，%s！%s一定真的伤害到他了！

noammo.en: Oh, we forgot to bring the cannonballs!

ammoloaded.en: We know we shouldn't play with it, but Willow says it's so much fun...
ammoloaded.trans: 我们知道我们不应该玩它，但薇洛说它可好玩了……

generic.en: Ms. Wickerbottom said we could play with it as long as there's no cannonballs inside.
generic.trans: 薇克巴顿女士说，只要里面没有炮弹，我们就可以玩。

quagmire_crabmeat.trans: 螃蟹看起来有点像蜘蛛。

low.en: The fire's getting a touch low.

embers.en: We should put something on the fire before it goes out.
embers.trans: 我们应该在熄火前加点东西进去。

generic.en: Sure beats the cold. And darkness.
generic.trans: 这样就可以赶走寒冷，还有黑暗。

winter_food8.en: It makes our claws and tummy so warm.
winter_food8.trans: 它让我们的爪子和肚子如此温暖。

moonglass_charged.en: There's still lightning stuck in it!

winter_food5.en: Haha, Wendy! Watch our Woodie impression!
winter_food5.trans: 哈哈，温蒂！看看我们的伍德印象！

winter_food1.en: I won't eat it. It's our friend now.
winter_food1.trans: 我不吃它。它现在是我们的朋友了。

winter_food3.en: Eat twenty candy canes! There's no candy shame!
winter_food3.trans: 吃了二十块拐杖糖！对糖果好不感到羞愧！

moon_altar_rock_seed.en: Oh no, someone's trapped inside that rock!
moon_altar_rock_seed.trans: 噢不，有人困在石头里面了！

record_dusk.en: It makes us want to do a little dance!
record_dusk.trans: 这让我们想跳一支小舞！

stalagmite.trans: 岩石长在地下？！长见识了。

chesspiece_warg_mutated.en: We thought only cats had nine lives!
chesspiece_warg_mutated.trans: 我们以为只有猫有九条命！

playbill_the_veil.en: It's not scary. We won't cover our eyes.
playbill_the_veil.trans: 这个不吓人。我们不会按住眼睛。

icebox.trans: 不要腐烂了，我的食物们！

common.trans: 妈妈总是说：“按照指示来”。

quagmire_grill.en: We have to be careful when we cook.
quagmire_grill.trans: 我们烹饪的时候一定要小心。

friendly.en: We love how it spins and spins and spins.
friendly.trans: 我们好喜欢它转转转的样子！

damaged.en: We can fix it, or take its insides!
damaged.trans: 我们可以修好它，或者拿走它里面的瓤子！

wagstaff_npc_mutations.en: Hi Mister, do you have any games we can play instead?
wagstaff_npc_mutations.trans: 先生您好，您有什么别的我们可以玩的游戏吗？

chesspiece_yotd.en: We had a lot of fun that day!

nightmarelight.en: Not exactly my kind of nightlight.

book_horticulture.en: Reading about veggies is almost as bad as eating them!
book_horticulture.trans: 阅读蔬菜的东西就跟吃蔬菜一样无聊！

slingshotammo_honey.en: Do you want us to help clean up?

chesspiece_yots.en: We can play with this worm!
chesspiece_yots.trans: 我们可以和这条蠕虫玩了！

beefalo_groomer_item.en: We'd better get it set up.

turf_badlands.en: Some ground that we dug up.

held.trans: 待在我们的口袋里你会很舒服。

generic.trans: 红色是我最喜爱的颜色！

dragonfly.en: Oh, don't you just drag on.

turf_ruinsbrick_glow.en: It looks old, but it's not really.
turf_ruinsbrick_glow.trans: 虽然看起来旧，但不是真的旧。

melted.en: We guess it's too hot out.

generic.en: I hope our boat doesn't run into it.
generic.trans: 我们的船可不要撞上了。

yotb_sewingmachine.en: We're really good with silk and threads!
yotb_sewingmachine.trans: 我们真的很会用丝和线!

firestarter.en: %s, you lit a fire!

ghost.en: Don't worry, %s, we'll find you a heart!
ghost.trans: 别担心，%s，我们会帮你找一颗心脏的！

murderer.en: Meanie! Get'em!
murderer.trans: 刻薄鬼！抓住他们！

reviver.en: %s is super nice to ghosts.

generic.en: It'll let us play if we give it something shiny.
generic.trans: 如果我们给它闪亮的东西，它就会让我们玩。

slingshotammo_purebrilliance.en: Do you want us to help clean up?

costume_tree_body.en: We can wear it in the play!

pottedfern.en: Mum would like this nice fern.
pottedfern.trans: 这盆蕨类植物很漂亮，妈妈肯定喜欢。

fertilizer.en: I saw mum use this in her gardens.
fertilizer.trans: 我曾经看到妈妈在她的花园里用这个东西。

describe_plantstressed.en: Aw, this plant doesn't look very happy...
describe_plantstressed.trans: 啊，这株植物看起来不是很开心……

spider.en: We didn't actually want to hurt you.
spider.trans: 实际上，我们并不想伤害你。

generic.trans: 记住了，我们本来会赢的！

announce_mutated_buzzard_arrival.trans: 秃鹫！嘿，它们看起来好奇怪。

announce_detach_buff_sleepresistance.en: Actually... we might feel a bit sleepy again.
announce_detach_buff_sleepresistance.trans: 那个嘛……我们可能还是会打瞌睡。

announce_flare_seen.en: Oh, someone's calling us to come over.

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_found_last_o.en: That was the last one, we won!
announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_found_last_o.trans: 最后一只也让我们找到了，赢啦！

wintersfeastfuel.en: It... reminds me of mom's cooking...

tallbirdegg_cracked.en: What if it hatches in our belly?
tallbirdegg_cracked.trans: 要是它在我们的肚子里孵出来怎么办？

announce_hunt_wrong_fork.en: Why do we feel like something's watching us...
announce_hunt_wrong_fork.trans: 我们总感觉有东西在看着我们……

announce_ticoon_abandoned.en: We felt like using him was a bit like cheating anyway.
announce_ticoon_abandoned.trans: 反正我们也不想靠他作弊。

1.en: Owie, that was not a nice plant!

2.en: Eek, we feel all burny inside!
2.trans: 咿呀，我们身体里感觉像烧着了一样！

announce_nodangersiesta.trans: 附近有怪物出没，不能午休！

announce_lunarhail_bird_sounds.trans: 那些鸟儿听起来不开心呢。

announce_bees.trans: 满世界飞的蜇人的东西！

announce_yoth_oncooldown.en: Aw, those horses must be doing chores right now.
announce_yoth_oncooldown.trans: 啊，那些马儿现在一定在忙着劳动呢。

1.en: Hey! You're going the wrong way!

2.en: You're supposed to go the other way!

announce_attach_buff_sleepresistance.trans: 我们再也不会打瞌睡了！

announce_bravery_potion.en: Hey, those trees aren't so scary anymore!
announce_bravery_potion.trans: 嘿，那些树没那么可怕了！

announce_quake.en: I don't think that was our tummy.
announce_quake.trans: 我认为这不是我们的肚子在叫。

announce_winters_feast_buff_over.trans: 嗷，我们刚刚玩的好开心！

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_toofar.en: We don't think the kitcoons would go this far out...

announce_lunarhail_bird_corpses.en: Maybe they're coming down for a rest.
announce_lunarhail_bird_corpses.trans: 它们可能是飞累了下来歇歇。

announce_oceanfishing_linetooloose.en: Should we reel it in a bit?

announce_healingsalve_acidbuff_done.en: We'd better not go out in the acid rain until we put on more repellent.
announce_healingsalve_acidbuff_done.trans: 我们还是喷了驱酸剂再进酸雨里去。

prey.en: We will put you in our web!
prey.trans: 我们要将你捉到我们的蜘蛛网里！

spider_warrior.en: Why can't we just get along?!
spider_warrior.trans: 我们为什么不能好好相处呢？！

announce_fan_out.trans: 哦，扇风的东西已经坏了。

announce_weight_heavy.trans:
重量: {weight}
哇, 真是重啊!

announce_otterboat_outofshallows.en: Uh-oh... maybe we shouldn't have rowed out so far.
announce_otterboat_outofshallows.trans: 呃噢……也许我们不该划这么远的船。

describe_plantstressornutrients.en: Maybe it needs some better dirt?
describe_plantstressornutrients.trans: 也许它需要一些更好的泥土？

announce_nosleephaspermanentlight.en: We can't sleep with such a bright nightlight...
announce_nosleephaspermanentlight.trans: 夜灯这么亮，我们睡不着……

announce_kitcoon_hideandseek_start.en: Ready or not, here we come!
announce_kitcoon_hideandseek_start.trans: 我们开始找了，你们要藏好！

announce_boomerang.en: It hurts us when we don't catch it.
announce_boomerang.trans: 如果接不住，它就会伤到我们。

announce_attach_buff_workeffectiveness.en: We can help out with the chores!

announce_tool_tooweak.en: We don't think this tool's strong enough!
announce_tool_tooweak.trans: 我们觉得这把工具不够强！

describe_plantverystressed.trans: 这株植物看起来很糟糕！

announce_cant_escape_curse.en: Oh... maybe we don't want to throw it away after all.
announce_cant_escape_curse.trans: 噢……也许我们并不想把它丢掉。

announce_yotd_noboats.en: We're not close enough to the starting point!

announce_nodaysleep.trans: 现在是白天，不是睡觉时间。

announce_detach_buff_moistureimmunity.en: Nooo! Spiders don't like the damp!

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_toofar_retur.en: We're back in the kitcoon's playground.
announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_toofar_retur.trans: 又回到小浣猫的操场了。

announce_hunt_start_fork.en: Whatever left those prints must be big... and scary...
announce_hunt_start_fork.trans: 留下这些脚印的动物一定又大又可怕……

announce_monkey_curse_change.en: What? How...? Now we're really confused...
announce_monkey_curse_change.trans: 什么？怎么……？到底是怎么回事……

describe_toodark.trans: 我们的所有眼睛都停止了工作！

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_losegame.trans: 嗷……你们出来吧，算你们赢！

announce_scrapbook_full.en: We already filled up our scrapbook.
announce_scrapbook_full.trans: 我们已经填满了我们的图鉴。

announce_nomountedgift.en: I promise I'll ride you again after I open my present!
announce_nomountedgift.trans: 我保证，我打开礼物后，会再骑你的！

announce_yotd_nocheckpoints.en: Oops! We forgot to set up the checkpoints!
announce_yotd_nocheckpoints.trans: 哎呀！我们好像忘了立检查点了！

actionfail_generic.en: Mom told me never to do that.
actionfail_generic.trans: 妈妈告诫我绝对不要那样做。

announce_petrifed_trees.en: The trees are yelling at us!!

announce_carrat_error_stunned.en: Oh no! Snap out of it!

announce_klaus_enrage.en: Ah! I'm sorry we killed your deer!!
announce_klaus_enrage.trans: 啊！对不起，我们杀了你的鹿！！

announce_attach_buff_electricattack.en: With great lightning powers comes great responsibility!

announce_archive_new_knowledge.trans: 哈哈，让我们的大脑都痒痒的！

announce_insufficientfertilizer.en: Not good enough for you, plant?
announce_insufficientfertilizer.trans: 对你来说养分还不够，是吗？

no_station.en: We can't make that right now.

no_tech.en: We're not sure how to make that yet...
no_tech.trans: 我们还不知道怎么做那个……

describe_smoldering.trans: 啊哦。我闻到了燃烧的味道！

announce_monkey_curse_1.en: We feel weird... weirder than usual...
announce_monkey_curse_1.trans: 我们感觉很怪……比以往还怪……

describe_plantstressorfamily.en: Maybe it would be happier if it wasn't alone?
describe_plantstressorfamily.trans: 如果不是一个人的话，也许会更幸福吧？

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_found_last_o.en: We did it, we found them all!
announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_found_last_o.trans: 我们赢了，全部都找到了！

announce_ticoon_nothing_to_track.en: Doesn't look like he found any clues here.
announce_ticoon_nothing_to_track.trans: 看起来他在这里没有发现任何线索。

describe_plantstressorseason.en: We don't think it likes this weather very much.
describe_plantstressorseason.trans: 我们认为它不太喜欢这样的天气。

announce_deerclops.en: That sounded like a big meanie.
announce_deerclops.trans: 听起来好像是个巨无霸。

announce_rabbitking_lucky.trans: 我们看到一只奇怪的兔子！

announce_hunt_avoid_fork.en: We feel better sticking to the safer trail.
announce_hunt_avoid_fork.trans: 我们觉得还是选安全一点的踪迹。

announce_boat_sink.trans: 我们这么年轻，不能就这么淹死了！

announce_ticoon_start_tracking.en: Wow! He's leading us right to the kitcoons! ...Is that cheating?
announce_ticoon_start_tracking.trans: 哇！他直接带我们去找小浣猫了！……这算不算作弊？

announce_wet.trans: 我们身上湿答答的，真不舒服。

announce_toadescaping.en: It's looking around for a way out.
announce_toadescaping.trans: 它东张西望，在寻找出去的路。

announce_yotd_notenoughboats.en: We should make some room, in case somebody wants to join in!
announce_yotd_notenoughboats.trans: 我们腾出点空间吧，也许有人会想加入！

announce_rabbitking_passive.trans: 有什么东西正在我们周围挖洞！

announce_kitcoon_hideandseek_join.en: Let's work together to find those kitcoons!
announce_kitcoon_hideandseek_join.trans: 让我们一起去找小浣猫吧！

announce_ticoon_dead.en: Oh no... where are we supposed to go now?
announce_ticoon_dead.trans: 嗷不要……这下我们要去哪找啊？

stale.trans: 一点都不新鲜，就像妈妈的剩饭剩菜一样。

invalid.en: That doesn't look like food to us.

yucky.en: We can't, we won't, we refuse to eat that.
yucky.trans: 我们打死也不要吃那玩意。

generic.trans: 美味尽在我们的肚子里！

announce_pirates_arrive.en: Uh oh... we're not sure we like the sound of that.
announce_pirates_arrive.trans: 饿哦……我们不太喜欢那声音。

announce_attach_buff_playerabsorption.en: We feel so much safer now!

announce_ticoon_waiting_for_leader.en: We should stay close to him.

announce_ticoon_lost_kitcoon.en: Either someone else found them, or this one is a lot tinier.
announce_ticoon_lost_kitcoon.trans: 可能是别人找到了，也可能是这只真的很小。

announce_eyeofterror_flyback.en: Coming back to play some more?

announce_carrat_error_walking.en: Come on, you've got to run faster!

announce_eyeofterror_flyaway.en: It doesn't want to play anymore.

announce_off_script.en: Is that how the play is supposed to go?

announce_nohungersiesta.en: Won't be able to nap with a rumbling tummy.
announce_nohungersiesta.trans: 肚子饿得咕咕叫，没法午休。

1.en: Hi plants! How do you do today?
1.trans: 嗨，植物们！今天过得怎么样？

2.en: Aww, are you lonely? We'll keep you company!
2.trans: 啊，你寂寞了吗？我们会陪你的!

3.en: One day you're going to grow up big and strong... and then we'll eat you!
3.trans: 总有一天你会长得又大又壮……然后我们就把你吃掉！

4.en: You are a very good plant.

5.en: We're always here when you need somebody to talk to!
5.trans: 你想聊天的话，我们就在这陪你！

announce_enter_dark.en: We can't see! I want my nightlight.
announce_enter_dark.trans: 什么都看不到！我想要我的夜灯。

announce_ticoon_get_leader_attention.en: They want to get back to finding the kitcoons.

announce_nodangergift.en: We'll open it later as a celebration of surviving this!
announce_nodangergift.trans: 我们等下再打开它，庆祝我们劫后余生！

announce_wetter.en: Wet as a bathtub we can't crawl out of.
announce_wetter.trans: 湿得就像一个我们爬不出去的浴缸。

announce_otterboat_denbroken.en: We really shouldn't have broken that den!
announce_otterboat_denbroken.trans: 我们真不该弄坏那个窝！

announce_worms.en: Ohhh nooo. We're not friends with worms!
announce_worms.trans: 哦，不。我们和蠕虫不是朋友！

announce_nodangersleep.trans: 附近有怪物出没，不能睡觉！

describe_plantstressormoisture.en: We should give it some water.
